body:

#

This is HUGE news, Peter. [Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93419?refcode=em20250808-9246&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=2&akid=9246%2E614464%2EvtqaBX) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93419?refcode=em20250808-9246&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=3&akid=9246%2E614464%2EvtqaBX) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93418?refcode=em20250808-9246&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9246%2E614464%2EvtqaBX)
---
Peter: **North Carolina was already going to be one of the top U.S. Senate races happening this cycle.** With the map stacked against Democrats, _we MUST flip North Carolina in order to take back the Senate next year._
Before GOP Senator Thom Tillis announced his intent to retire, Cook Political Report rated North Carolina’s U.S. Senate race ‘Leans Republican.’
**But then, after he announced that he would leave the seat vacant in 2026, Cook Political Report upgraded this race to a TOSS UP!** This is a clear sign that the momentum is on our side.

name: Jackson County Republican Party
subject: New Chair Introduction
body:
Introduction Letter
<https://app.dvcomms.net/api/Communication/View?prm=MbIJ7QHiWuivoqqogirwlpBkeUQ4ZWfIn0GDIdO_iG3HxHcEFpM6GDPJGjKrEqhgifh5i5UxI2Za-zMEO27AYm3V41qc1w3wtnRgVul0o0Hh16kqxl1omolmKFBQk-qMDa1Swb7gOWdT5YJi3onussFBciE_bmDG6VuAASS_ea2qSGTHjZUPzxoRO9NEQxcHAJAt-T1TVjh5HpWITyA2IH0T31GtJiehJoy2p4IQF601>
View this email in a browser

Hello, Fellow Southern Oregonians,

I would like to take a moment to introduce myself. My name is Joyce Michelangelo, and I am the new Chair of the Jackson County Republican Party. I am a mother, grandmother, wife, U.S. Army veteran and a lifelong Republican. For most of my career I worked in electronics, in support of the Defense Industry. Providing great equipment to help keep our country safe was an honor. I step into this role with great excitement for the future. My primary goal is to support President Trump’s “Return to Common Sense Policy”. Common sense policies are Republican policies. We have hard working Oregonians that understand common sense in their work and in the raising of their families. However, I cannot achieve this goal without your support. Together, we can work towards this and other objectives that align with the Republican Party Platform for 2025 and beyond.

I believe we share many values and beliefs that unite us in our cause. To help achieve these goals, I kindly ask that you consider setting up a recurring monthly donation of $20 for the next 12 months. My aim is to have 1,000 individuals and companies set up this recurring donation. Please click on the donation link below or scan the QR code provided.

I would like to leave you with the first paragraph of the 2025 Republican Party Platform:

**A Return to Common Sense**
Our nation's history is filled with stories of brave men and women who gave everything to build America into the greatest nation in the history of the world. Generations of American patriots have summoned the American spirit of strength, determination, and love of country to overcome seemingly insurmountable challenges. The American people have proven time and again that we can overcome any obstacle and any force pitted against us.

Thank you for your support. . Please click on the donation link below or scan the QR code provided.

I 've officially launched my campaign to defeat Democrat Jon Ossoff in Georgia and fight for President Trump's Agenda in the Senate. .** But before rushing over your donation, Peter, please allow me to tell you: ** 1) Who I am 2) Why I 'm running for U.S. Senate; and __ 3) How YOU can help defeat Democrat Jon Ossoff and deliver a MASSIVE WIN for the America First movement There's no time to waste. Let's jump right into it. 1\. WHO I AM My name is Mike Collins. I was born in Jackson, Georgia. Never left either. It's where I raised my kids, it's where I built my trucking business, and it's where I plan to spend the rest of my years with my wife, Leigh Ann. I may be a sitting Congressman, but I never thought I'd run for office. That's not something truckers from Jackson think about doing too often. But like you, I saw the writing on the wall; When the Biden Regime stole the 2020 election, it was clear**Americans like you and me were going to lose our country, fast. ** Fast forward two years, and I 'm proud to stand by President Trump, fight for his America First Mandate, and fix the mess the Democrats made of our country: > Passing the Laken Riley Act:**** a bill I authored in honor of Laken Riley -the young Georgia student who was MURDERED by one of Joe Biden 's illegals - making it easier for law enforcement to arrest illegal aliens guilty of committing crimes. > Passing the Big Beautiful Bill:**** cutting taxes, ending the "green" scams harming our farmers, and supercharging ICE deportations with BILLIONS in funding. > Codifying DOGE cuts into federal law**: exposing the deep state rot in our government and eliminating the waste, fraud, and abuse Americans like YOU are paying for. My Democrat opponent, on the other hand, voted "NO" on all of these things. Which brings me to the next part... 2\. WHY I 'M RUNNING FOR SENATE ** Democrat Jon Ossoff doesn't care about the border... He doesn't care about millions of illegals invading our country... He doesn't care about crime, high taxes, or the fact middle class Americans are being CRUSHED by job killing regulations and power-hungry elites. All he cares about is when that next big check will come in from his donors in California and New York, and when he 'll get his 15 minutes of fame for IMPEACHING President Trump. That's right, Peter. Jon Ossoff 's #1 campaign promise right now is to weaponize another bogus, sham impeachment against our President. That 's why I'm running for Senate to defeat him. President Trump only has a few years left in office and a third impeachment would DERAIL everything we're fighting for. Ain 't no two ways about it - Ossoff must be defeated, and I. Which leads me to part three... 3\. HOW YOU CAN HELP ME DEFEAT **DEMOCRAT JON OSSOFF ** You and I don't need to reinvent the wheel here. To win, we must focus on turning out RECORD REPUBLICAN VOTES in Georgia. Remember: there are no such thing as Senate districts. This race will be won or lost based on who can get the most votes in the state of Georgia. That 's why Democrats like Jon Ossoff pour MILLIONS into cities like Atlanta. It's the easiest way they can get the votes they need without doing any of the travel and legwork. Me on the other hand? I'm a former trucker who's used to driving hours and hours to get the job done and get it done right. And as a Republican, I must travel to all four corners of Georgia to meet with rural voters who will be the real difference makers in this election. This is where YOU come in, Peter. By rushing over $25 today ... You can so I can drive to the most remote and rural parts of Georgia - winning votes in areas most politicians "don't have time" to visit. By rushing over $50 today ... You can - making it known to voters that Republicans are the only party serious about ending the invasion at our border, cracking down on crime, and bringing down the inflation crippling American families. Or, if you 're able to donate $100, $200, all the way up to the FEC max of $3,500... Your one-time generous donation helps me pouring MILLIONS into Jon Ossoff's campaign to buy this election. But regardless of how much you can give, the most critical factor is time. Republicans like you and me cannot wait until election year rolls around to get moving. My team and I are going to battle NOW, and. ? America First, Always, Rep. Mike Collins (R-GA) Candidate for United States Senate P.S. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Paxton is trying to shut down Powered by People
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
**
They want to make examples out of those who fight so that others won't.
Paxton is trying to shut down Powered by People, one of the largest voter registration organizations in the country, because our volunteers fight for voting rights and free elections... the kind of work that threatens the hold that Paxton, Trump and Abbott have on power in Texas.
In addition to helping register hundreds of thousands of voters, our members have volunteered in other important ways, including picking up thousands of shifts at Texas food banks. During Abbott’s electricity grid failure in 2021, we made more than a million calls to connect seniors to warming centers and safety.
We also purchased nearly a million dollars in supplies for Texans abandoned by their elected officials who were too busy fleeing to Cancun or letting their gas pipeline donors steal billions in illegal profits while hundreds of Texans were dying.
Now Paxton’s filed a restraining order to try to take us out of the fight. He wants to silence me and stop me from leading this organization. He wants to stop us from fighting Trump’s attempt to steal the five congressional seats he needs to hang on to power.
But I’m not going anywhere.
I plan on speaking at our rally to stop the power grab in Fort Worth tomorrow afternoon.
This is our moment to fight for our democracy as hard as we possibly can. We’re going to take this fight to Paxton, Abbott, and Trump with everything we have.
[**Please pitch a few bucks to help support Powered by People in this critical moment.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250808-3.SSOMKC&refcode=ema20250808-240299&t=2&akid=240299%2E444211%2EVsDjzj)
In solidarity,
Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20250808-240299-footer&t=3&refcode2=240299_444211_VsDjzj&akid=240299%2E444211%2EVsDjzj)**
Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople.org](http://www.poweredxpeople.org?akid=240299%2E444211%2EVsDjzj), not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=240299%2E444211%2EVsDjzj).

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2f736qoe482gphomgm6nue52r9h1jg4i6kqj508_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj6cor1c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zarqv5cgtkpp1njo0p1eftuhbat0a8tfb5v4sq30_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj6cor1c5h2bs) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztet9f33j9p0eilh6930mmvhj0hslbea2jc1g280_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj6cor1c5h2bs). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvkhemfanl7ddamjfasoagp16kqvrbflapk8u7kg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj6cor1c5h2bs)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2za9p0f1ahu8it27a3s29dogah5vvcn6f7am1232g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj62pb4chh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zib4d99j0h4c5s3jhkkv54tdevduv0up53is4hpg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj62pb4chh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6iitkk3iish1r6a2kfngrp2anq5kbmatjs0foe8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj62pb4chh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zm5443lp6f8eu5nq6nkri2flkck5jcfkpep4blv8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj62pb4chh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5ckhri22315mth910v6ra6ksvsmqcugfovndup0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj62pb4chh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3c919103sn3qk9cah3a718jh3nl1t2l7k01shpg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj62pb4chh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2vuqre0fcdup7eblv5rldvm8e833ejnglhp6ui0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj62pb4chh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9t84q251m44eo6j2e2sieh2epji31ptkntc7nno_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj62pb4chh2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1hrlvask2icjklo4cdrj8383n2jb4h8dkqfpf20_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj62pb4chh2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9k40mqj32g7fjurdioqt9g1ur717t9fhvq14sd8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj62pb4chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9ttle9q3bd9ieir38ct3mkrnctt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8ob7cjhm2ob24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrhovqmuf9dlg0p7lg0lg3iqear7p2jglbtck5n0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj62pb4chh2bs)_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrc5lh1ljf9bt1rv20dtsnle1lhk66rbrt72npg0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr5c5jmcob5chi649fg)

It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Iggy and Mr. Kirk. name: James O'Keefe
subject: Bombshell Video Dropping Soon – We Need Your Help to Keep Exposing the Truth!
body:
We have a bombshell video releasing very soon that you absolutely won't want to miss. In it, we'll be exposing a State Department official knowingly jeopardizing U.S. national security.

| [****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z15c8vutu1ogjt9gf530uue4pl031ciu3o8fl8tg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj6eoj2cth2bs)
[****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z55r74qf3m70fjuhdpruqnau6sttda10lcjomev8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj6eoj2cth2bs) Dear Patriot,

We're on the verge of something huge at O'Keefe Media Group (OMG).

**We have a bombshell video releasing very soon** that you absolutely won't want to miss.

In it, we'll be exposing a State Department official knowingly jeopardizing U.S. national security by blatantly ignoring State Department policy designed to keep America safe.

We've reached out to the State Department for comment and are waiting to hear back - **stay tuned, because this one is going to send shockwaves.**

But [**I need your donation today to finish this investigation**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo9652m20bh2a4iofl7hghhel78gl9gtf7oa6f30_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj6eoj2cth2bs) and another massive one we have in the works.

We're deep into another massive story that's set to break soon, one that will **shake up Washington** like never before.

To finish these investigations and bring you the unfiltered truth, [**I need your support now more than ever.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm4tno4p18lh7boa907a6r0t9j2grsrrthelps28_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj6eoj2cth2bs)

Here's the reality: Running OMG isn't easy or cheap.

**I have bills to pay, airfare to cover for our undercover operations, and film editors and researchers who need to be compensated for their incredible work.**

Our small staff is the heart and soul of what we do - a dedicated team of truth-seekers who work tirelessly, **seven days a week, at a breakneck pace** to uncover corruption and hold the powerful accountable.

These are everyday heroes: journalists, editors, and investigators who sacrifice family time, sleep, and personal lives to fight for transparency.

They've been with me through thick and thin, facing threats, legal battles, and endless obstacles. Without them, stories like this wouldn't see the light of day.

But right now, we're stretched thin, and [**your generosity is what keeps us going**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zja0101k2251e77as21qjdqdp95tapvntvn98o68_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj6eoj2cth2bs).

**By[**supporting OMG**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zolr1nhlfv75gimcfeljm5p3g624jsr3qm97c908_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj6eoj2cth2bs), you're not just donating - you're empowering a great staff to continue their vital mission and protect our nation's integrity.**

[**Will you stand with us today?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdjk2bb81qbq999ih3gglj34h2rka1cfv7chp3hg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj6eoj2cth2bs)

Your contribution, no matter the size, will help us finalize these explosive stories and keep the pressure on. Please have our back by [**donating securely and make a real difference**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl6bu0lbl8ln4cgm794213i08375koe6ge3hp08o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj6eoj2cth2bs).

Thank you so much for all that you do. I can't do this work without you.

Together, me you and the amazing men and women working hard at OMG, we're exposing the truth and changing the world. [**Help us keep going today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z48tu06au3l55br2jq6nj30fctd6dteb0kj9udgo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj6eoj2cth2bs)

In Truth,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zsjoclucos0pm0m0v4qego5s0kvt4ombf4dus428_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj61p34cth2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpfon9lnhr8v908pmej5ri4dg6fqpr339pssv758_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj61p34cth2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlnq5s8si857g6fdaaqq0p53neibrdqh9akt3gc0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj61p34cth2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmleh3ikicrucpeaqhn25ik3gi0imo3tv2a32798_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj61p34cth2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpffhhhmrghslu8udlh79i39s9fhbmp4e1gvm2ko_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj61p34cth2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zljsg4fvgm0ifghrt6ljciqu3bkgnhmdovscuq9o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj61p34cth2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zppmrrig0vk20otfcj77a31ir4dorbdbn5pe610g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj61p34cth2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z74e58fbqq205d7j3do82e18i27gi6hev2i32eio_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj61p34cth2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---

name: John James
subject: They want to bury us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312
body:
We’ve been gaining ground, and the Left knows it.

| | | Friend, We’ve been gaining ground, and the Left knows it.That’s why they’re trying to **bury this campaign before it takes off for real**. Let me update you on the state of this race:
* The smears are intensifying.
* The dark money’s flowing.
* And national Democrats are doing everything they can to choke off our momentum before it becomes unstoppable.

_But I’ve seen this kind of pressure before. I didn’t fight for this country to back down now._
---
[ **BE MY CO-PILOT** ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvhg0f09em675qhp1pcbbu1p719o2f59jkdhq4d0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj61p34c3h2bs)
---
I’m fighting for a state where my sons can grow up. Where all of our children can achieve the American Dream. [**If you believe in that too, I need you on this team right now.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z04vdm30p3hrur6afs8e55og1fdiorlloa35lq5o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj61p34c3h2bs) Let’s make sure they never get the chance to bury us.
---
[ **JOIN THE FIGHT** ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zhv1r9d84t7od68bmhscnf3d131f2pbh4cs689o8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1ctj61p34c3h2bs)

– John James

#
* * *
---
---
# **When Our Voting Rights are Under Attack,_We Fight Back_**
This week marks the 60th Anniversary of the Voting Rights Act. The irony of this coinciding with [J.D. Vance coming to Indiana to push Governor Braun and other Republican leaders to turn our beloved state into a political pawn](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=025123439574a66afbe1697aaa8baf33934e473d18ec1a8042cd4b81c10f124c2941a64ab0210f55f12ef0765e54824917b686d2aa9d953f) can not be overstated. Thursday, **[behind a literal curtain](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=025123439574a66a7a7d49230cc2424bf43a2cb5f9e2e9b28f9432ddb5f815a0f6bbdcb500cfa3c80bf00da7dfb9a6e675f273bd1f1c24ca)** , Statehouse Republicans met with the Vice President to discuss an unprecedented redistricting of our state just four years after our congressional maps were last redrawn. **This is a problem.** Typically, these maps are redrawn after a census (every 10 years) to account for population changes, and, _in theory_ , to ensure that folks are being fairly represented by their school board member, state senator or congressperson.
### So, why are we discussing changing them now?
Less than a year into his term, Trump has figured out that he and his party have a losing message. Their policies are crushing working families throughout this country, and voters will let them hear it in 2026. This reality has led to the sinister plot of going into Republican Majority states and pressuring them to redraw their maps to help them rig the system. We are at a moment where the Federal government is using its political power to stifle the voices of not only those who disagree with them, but also every single American who would be impacted by hastily redrawn maps -- every person, regardless of political affiliation, loses when they do not have fair representation. They are counting on Indiana to be the next to join the fray. **But I have hope.** We know that the arc of the moral universe is long, but it always bends toward justice. **And it bends because of us.** Because we stand shoulder to shoulder, united in the belief that the health of our republic is more important than the political games played in Washington, D.C. This week, Hoosiers left no doubt that they are ready to fight for our Democracy and to fight for fair representation. I know that eventually the liars, cheats and oppressors **will** lose. When they do, it'll be because we never stopped applying pressure, never stopped showing up and never stopped fighting to create the future our ancestors dreamed of.
### What this can look like _today_ :
* Call Governor Braun's office and tell him **NO** to Washington's redistricting plan - **(317) 232-4567**
* Call Speaker of the House Todd Huston and tell him **NO** to Washington's redistricting plan - **317-232-9677**
* Call Senate President Pro Tem Rodric Bray and tell him **NO** to Washington's redistricting plan - **317-232-9400**
* Educate your family members, friends and networks on what is happening in our state right now -- **knowledge is power**.
* Stay tuned for more updates in the coming days, **it'll take all of us**.

* * *
---
# Watch My Full Comments From Thursday's Rally
---
| [](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=025123439574a66aeb2a42dee00839a9ff53fc751c18c1deeeafa3da2ac843cbeebe4f52ea861bd8c5cae3ab048de8a54a2d462b24ed21f9)
---
#
* * *
---
| | | |
---
| |
# Don't Miss this Opportunity to Make your Voice Heard
Indy, AES is trying to raise our electric bills _again_.

**They went up this year. **

**They are already scheduled to go up next year. **

And in 2027, **they want to raise them another $30.**

I have heard from too many folks struggling to keep up with rising utility bill prices.

With the summers getting warmer every year, we need to ensure that people are not priced out of keeping the AC running during dangerous temperatures.

**This will not be possible if bills keep rising at historic rates. **

There is still time to share any concerns about the rate increase with the [Indiana Utility Regulatory Commission](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=025123439574a66a517768ed5e95de3afd40b23deddef0685971da7adfbe28ecc61f15fe011aa7f7ffb0428197329a5ec52ae56bf4aecbd5 " Indiana Utility Regulatory Commission") (IURC), the body that will determine the outcome of this rate case.

There are four upcoming opportunities give in-person public comment:
* **August 18 at 6 PM - West Perry Branch, Indianapolis Public Library**
* **August 21 at 6 PM - Southeast Community Services Center**
* **August 25 at 6 PM - New Augusta Public Academy North Middle School**
* **August 27 at 6 PM - Fort Benjamin Harrison Event Center**

**Additionally, written public comment is open until Sept. 2, 2025.** To comment: **Mail:** OUCC Consumer Services 115 West Washington Street, Suite 1500 South, Indianapolis, Indiana 46204 **Email:** uccinfo@oucc.in.gov **Online** : [www.in.gov/oucc/2361.htm](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=f7bd2ca7c9d9d24bde7ae843979d00b4cbff3ecbdd1f87008960f0e2dabce92b57df0c8c744d12117950546210e7927eba6b65142e6979d9)

### Thank you for your advocacy and effort to shape our community.
* * *
---
| | | |
---
| | Join me at Arsenal Tech High School this upcoming Wednesday, August 13, at an event hosted by Indy's own The Whispering Shelf bookstore.

I will be sitting down with author, educator and organizer Dr. Eve L. Ewing to discuss her book, Original Sins, which examines "the (mis)education of black and native children and the construction of American racism."

I am so excited that an Indy small business is fostering a conversation around such a critical topic, and I am grateful to play a part in it.

I can't wait to see you there.

**The event is free and open to all! **

### **[Register Here](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=f7bd2ca7c9d9d24baf95036f47f242796903bdef898f1d8460f382c12fbe1c130037071376d07500e02bd07c54686748ab5b48585aebb184 "Regester Here")**

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- When Our Voting Rights are Under Attack,We Fight Back This week marks the 60th Anniversary of the Voting Rights Act. The irony of this coinciding with can not be overstated. Thursday, , Statehouse Republicans met with the Vice President to discuss an unprecedented redistricting of our state just four years after our congressional maps were last redrawn. This is a problem. Typically, these maps are redrawn after a census (every 10 years) to account for population changes, and, in theory , to ensure that folks are being fairly represented by their school board member, state senator or congressperson. So, why are we discussing changing them now? Less than a year into his term, Trump has figured out that he and his party have a losing message. Their policies are crushing working families throughout this country, and voters will let them hear it in 2026. This reality has led to the sinister plot of going into Republican Majority states and pressuring them to redraw their maps to help them rig the system. We are at a moment where the Federal government is using its political power to stifle the voices of not only those who disagree with them, but also every single American who would be impacted by hastily redrawn maps -- every person, regardless of political affiliation, loses when they do not have fair representation. They are counting on Indiana to be the next to join the fray. But I have hope. We know that the arc of the moral universe is long, but it always bends toward justice. And it bends because of us. Because we stand shoulder to shoulder, united in the belief that the health of our republic is more important than the political games played in Washington, D.C. This week, Hoosiers left no doubt that they are ready to fight for our Democracy and to fight for fair representation. I know that eventually the liars, cheats and oppressors will lose. When they do, it'll be because we never stopped applying pressure, never stopped showing up and never stopped fighting to create the future our ancestors dreamed of. What this can look like today : Call Governor Braun's office and tell him NO to Washington's redistricting plan - (317) 232-4567 Call Speaker of the House Todd Huston and tell him NO to Washington's redistricting plan - 317-232-9677 Call Senate President Pro Tem Rodric Bray and tell him NO to Washington's redistricting plan - 317-232-9400 Educate your family members, friends and networks on what is happening in our state right now -- knowledge is power. Stay tuned for more updates in the coming days, it'll take all of us. Watch My Full Comments From Thursday's Rally | | | | | | | Don't Miss this Opportunity to Make your Voice Heard Indy, AES is trying to raise our electric bills again. They went up this year. They are already scheduled to go up next year. And in 2027, they want to raise them another $30. I have heard from too many folks struggling to keep up with rising utility bill prices. With the summers getting warmer every year, we need to ensure that people are not priced out of keeping the AC running during dangerous temperatures. This will not be possible if bills keep rising at historic rates. There is still time to share any concerns about the rate increase with the " Indiana Utility Regulatory Commission" (IURC), the body that will determine the outcome of this rate case. There are four upcoming opportunities give in-person public comment: August 18 at 6 PM - West Perry Branch, Indianapolis Public Library August 21 at 6 PM - Southeast Community Services Center August 25 at 6 PM - New Augusta Public Academy North Middle School August 27 at 6 PM - Fort Benjamin Harrison Event Center Additionally, written public comment is open until Sept. 2, 2025. To comment: Mail: OUCC Consumer Services 115 West Washington Street, Suite 1500 South, Indianapolis, Indiana 46204 Email: uccinfo@oucc.in.gov Online : Thank you for your advocacy and effort to shape our community. | | | | | | Join me at Arsenal Tech High School this upcoming Wednesday, August 13, at an event hosted by Indy's own The Whispering Shelf bookstore. I will be sitting down with author, educator and organizer Dr. Eve L. Ewing to discuss her book, Original Sins, which examines "the (mis)education of black and native children and the construction of American racism." I am so excited that an Indy small business is fostering a conversation around such a critical topic, and I am grateful to play a part in it. I can't wait to see you there. The event is free and open to all! "Regester Here" My Interim Committee Assignments | | | | | | News Around Our State | | | "" "State agency plans aggressive new budget method to control growing Medicaid costs" "Construction is complete: New York, Michigan streets set for two-way traffic" COMMUNITY RESOURCES To view my community resources guide, "click here. * The smears are intensifying.

subject: War on Robocalls, Interstellar Visitor, and New Dodge Muscle Cars

# Saturday, August 9, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1945, the U.S. dropped [a second atomic bomb](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1urDAUhJ8GOiP_LeDCxW3o9rYpkcEHOImxkX12EW8fEeUN0o30STOj7-M5Ph0GjOt_t4OlJY0RzhKACPJ4upxiTlOaXQgFI0EuBCG4UXL5YLxn3IzeYbhGXXu7AEhQNVjRPXSnlNGm3qzSQkzGtQpAiV74jrcwLx03MHVCzb5Ge7fxnhvB-UO3jddT24NuOSwgleoqzcEjpdx8Joy0wRKu9IbczGmvg92IjlKpf5UcKjmc59lsWCjl6-aVHGjDwry7GEb2Syo5uNf6KsTMHSntOLMp7RPzOR0HeJYii251xX1hna0_TgwBS3t_WXeH4Web_iTsbeV3AAAA__9ksoF1) on Nagasaki, leading to Japan's unconditional surrender.

Today’s edition of _The Flyover_ celebrates speed. We feature items about a 130,000 mph interstellar comet, the most expensive speeding tickets in the U.S., and introduce the [710-horsepower Dodge Durango](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAURb_G3mwRwAQPDF28pWtHC8PDfukzRJiG5u8rV-oXdLnLlc69Oh-3-WaRMK7vdgdTQpoj1IOgFMhztTnFnJbkLNGBsUA-ChDZmTM-dEx3bJy9RXrNsvUmAHAQLZjLdZBXIUY5tptxC4BUXPFl5FoPwILSo1Sa6UsYgpAtmpPGNBsvjA1S9V4uSoNUDAJwIa6NZOCxpNzfE8ayQaBXekLuXdpbMlspj6MRbw2fGj7VWnsXF3eWDZ9OdMMnpv_CJ79C57-yjWvq7hZpyWA7t9m8Qu4O_H5Y99lvZac2G_-oSISHOk-su0X6HS3_MvU0_CcAAP__Azd8Dw) SRT Hellcat Jailbreak.

We're partnering today with [AARP](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0E1ugzAQQOHTmF3QMP7DCy-6YZduu0QDHieuHIyMFZrbV-kVeoHvSe_rOl8p5bTdPunBvsUyb3wemVvjOp9Uy1bLUlbK-Uhb43o0zplmBNQXGC_g5kApv2bVBR-ZkWXHfrBaWSmdct3dr8gLWRscklK0ahMd2TiGuFgwzEuX_FuDEdwAoJXpg1rMyMoAR0YprVDAIbVS---StnbnmF_lybVfy6PL_t7afgj5IXASOBHVvd9_Yp-KwGkVOCmnYXCjwEkiSO2cwGkwoE1XfdjPlHM6zDtye1DKf2j714mnx98AAAD__3fmby0), check out all the benefits highlighted in today's edition.

## States Launch Battle Against Illegal Robocalls
A bipartisan coalition of 51 state attorneys general launched a multistate effort [to end illegal robocalls,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGOqzAQxvHT2J0jMzYEChevoctrt0QOHuJZDTgyo6DcfkWkPcHWI_01v-_rNt0iMW2P_3HFIEuZNjx2RhGs0xFr2Wq5lzky77QJ1l2QOU5goTW2N3aYUiR-T16nsCACOo2hubb-6tzgB50DREjYNR56bFNyc-eaGd0ye2_7oWmipnDWbG-HxtrWd5fk712PvrO4IDh3Vd5iIin18l1ok4wLv8sL62Uuq-aQRZ67cv8UjApGyZiJ-bwpGHNZ8QQpGHeJguaIMmcFY-u96wFMeWKNQmUzv05DzPiIbD5oBaOuIT0PYqa9O395rJE-fS1_GuwV4CcAAP__riyAAg) which are automated telephone calls that deliver a pre-recorded message. The states began "Operation Robocall Roundup" by sending warning letters to 37 different voice providers [demanding “immediate action”](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O8yAQQE-DOywC-K-g-Bp3-dotLTBDMisCFkyCcvuVd7Un2HZGmnnvfVy3q8WI6fbfPsBQyFuCViMQQdmaLTmV7PJuY6yYCEoliNFuUsiBi5mLZfMW43vTnTcBQILqwFymQU9KLXrp7ka5MYhLsOD9bmcvVXCDdcFNoxjC7nSH5rwmZrFchBj02Hvtxhn0KCCAVGpiWoBHyqX_zJjoDiG-8wtKv-dHF82d6KhM_WNyZXJtrfW7q6fFuWdy9UAlIzG5nkMm13xAsYQ58V83XvIz-efBmy0J043_BKj8JGNy7YrxR8MYsY4nzu1hMX6_pz81exn5FQAA__9ENIOD) to prevent robocalls from being routed through their networks. The letters warn that the attorneys general are authorized to enforce federal law and state law enforcement actions. Thus, the providers must respond within 21 days with a plan on how to comply with the laws.
## Interstellar Visitor Caught on Camera
The Hubble Space Telescope [captured an image](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFutDAQhJ_GdEbG9gEuXPwN3f1tSrQ2y-FowSd7c-jePiJV-nQjjTTzzXzc5zskSsfjP-zoec3zgWclZMYyn1DyUXLIEYhqOhhLZSSCWSt9k2qUys0LJHrPtln8iqjRNOi74WYHY5x1zeZdcKPr4hDtoDoNq147GGwXjMUY-x6a5K80NSrXKXWzfbvY0I9oe4UramMGYRUuiXNpP3M6eMOV3vmFpY15b8hvzM8qzD-hJ6Gn8zzbGOq14vKFni4p9PQLv8iYd2RpkgQmqHL7CoFQMhLWmJ8o0w4PFHpqil-eZyJKtb84Hjsk-unlP5318vo7AAD__27EgAA) of the fastest comet ever observed, moving through our solar system at 130,000 mph, after traveling the universe for hundreds of millions of years. NASA discovered the 3I/ATLAS comet last month and determined that it was from interstellar space, [only the third interstellar object](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAQRp8Gull5bfNXuEhDd9OmRDYeFicDg-xZEG8f7a3Sp_6ko_OdX1_Tl0-U9tdPv6GThacdr0Iognm6fOY9c-DZE5W0C-YiSOQnrXQDqgc1TNEnuidbR7cgajQ1umfX2M6YwQ716mxYzBCWucFm6Tv99L0OczRGddrbGGKd3IemejU8lWps-4g2tD3aVuGC2piusgpjEs6P35x2WXGhm0_Mj5m3mtwqcpTK_Kj0WOnxuq5HOfyMn7XSoy-SeeftrvQ484ZSKj2u7xAIQZCwzHwgvNKJBd4F-J0hYBEg5j9wo4AXkBXhn_cZvkFgEnghX-BMERmOlYXr7OJxJaJU2o_4a_OJvkXlv-qeTv8NAAD__92vk1g) witnessed within our solar system. NASA said 3I/ATLAS should remain visible to telescopes through September before passing too close to the sun, reappearing by early December for renewed observations.
## List: Price of Speeding Tickets by State
Drivers going 10 mph over the posted speed limit can expect to pay the highest fines in California, Arizona, Nevada, and Texas, according to this list of [the most expensive speeding tickets](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGupDAQBNDTQAYytsEQONiEbDbdEDV2M9O7DUZ276C5_Rf_Cj-roFRPqj-P5QHEdDx_w45etrQceBVGEczLBTkdOa0pAHOhQzAXQWZYtNJ9o8ZGTUsE4s9i6-g3RI2mRt-53jpjJjvVLw9diHFcjemD7sE62_XuTls3bINzoSZ_r6lRTZ1SvR3aaNdhRDso3FAb4yqrMJKk3P5NdMgLN_6kN-Y2pL1m_xI5S2V-VXqu9HxdV_um8h84wEkCTEXuYqXnHc4TY1NOxEjHsxEK_1CakIqUZv00RUCw0nOdfTwvYqYy3PhzB-JvTH700NvrrwAAAP__XpZ8nA) by state. A recent study analyzed 2024 data on average fines and standard court fees across each state, ranking California as the highest for speeding costs at $234. Arizona followed closely at $231, with Nevada at $223, and Texas at $223. New Mexico and Nebraska have the lowest minimum fines at $25, followed by Montana and North Dakota at $40. The national average is $130, while the median value is slightly lower at $121. [See where your state ranks here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGupDAQBNDTQAYytsEQONiEbDbdEDV2M9O7DUZ276C5_Rf_Cj-roFRPqj-P5QHEdDx_w45etrQceBVGEczLBTkdOa0pAHOhQzAXQWZYtNJ9o8ZGTUsE4s9i6-g3RI2mRt-53jpjJjvVLw9diHFcjemD7sE62_XuTls3bINzoSZ_r6lRTZ1SvR3aaNdhRDso3FAb4yqrMJKk3P5NdMgLN_6kN-Y2pL1m_xI5S2V-VXqu9HxdV_um8h84wEkCTEXuYqXnHc4TY1NOxEjHsxEK_1CakIqUZv00RUCw0nOdfTwvYqYy3PhzB-JvTH700NvrrwAAAP__XpZ8nA).

**➤ The Department of Justice **issued two subpoenas to New York Attorney General Letitia James, one for her handling of the civil fraud investigation into President Trump and the other for her office’s investigation into the National Rifle Association. James is also under investigation by the FBI for alleged mortgage fraud. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2upDAMhZ8GOo9yk_BXpNiG7m67JTLEMB6FBCVmRrz9iivtE2zjxtbn850_39M3cuC4_cadnKxpivQpgUQoTx_MKeY0pwVDKByFchEKASetdAOqBzVMHjlck629W4k0mZrcV9fYzpjBDvXTmRnt0GukQQ_rbNamX2avW9ssfdsp3dTsbprq1fClVGPbh7dz25NtFa2kjekqq8izpPx4JY7ypDVc6U35saS9Du4pcpTK_Kr0WOkxXkcqcq8qPd7gSo-q_zfOArffzx3gBoGEhRFeuFOBcs5HoojkYb7gdRbhhcDTgVl2igL3V7CN3WHhNwdYM54eFiwEuCHHIiD53I9Kj3V2_vhwCFza22DbkcNPYvmvmt9O_w0AAP__nhOSVw)) **➤ A federal appeals court** voted 2-1 to dismiss Judge James Boasberg’s finding of contempt against the Trump administration for disobeying his order to turn around deportation flights out of the U.S. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O6yAUBOCngY6I8GObguI27nLbLS2Mj2NWxwbBSay8_cr7CluP9Glmvh7TIyRMx_N_2MHTmqcDzoZABHU6Q81HzXOOAbGlg6A2AsQwKamskIOQblpCws9k-OJXAAWag7_31vRaO-P45m2MoZOuD87Ns7ami_1qghxmOSxg7MyTvzQ5SHeX0prutpi5G8B0ElZQWvfMSFgS5Xr7zumgDVb85DfUW8w7R78Rlcb0P6ZGpkbaYEuIV8bUuOUdrkFMjdYYfVeDCKVAwCZiflUSLdZQmqD62ouI-SDYCzE18uqXcibE1LqrwHMP6Rfl9KeX3l79BAAA__-UuHym)) **➤ President Trump** on Friday removed Billy Long as commissioner of the Internal Revenue Service just two months after Long was confirmed. clean_body: A bipartisan coalition of 51 state attorneys general launched a multistate effort which are automated telephone calls that deliver a pre-recorded message. | | | | | | Saturday, August 9, 2025 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1945, the U.S. dropped on Nagasaki, leading to Japan's unconditional surrender. Today’s edition of The Flyover celebrates speed. We feature items about a 130,000 mph interstellar comet, the most expensive speeding tickets in the U.S., and introduce the SRT Hellcat Jailbreak. We're partnering today with , check out all the benefits highlighted in today's edition. | States Launch Battle Against Illegal Robocalls A bipartisan coalition of 51 state attorneys general launched a multistate effort which are automated telephone calls that deliver a pre-recorded message. The states began "Operation Robocall Roundup" by sending warning letters to 37 different voice providers to prevent robocalls from being routed through their networks. The letters warn that the attorneys general are authorized to enforce federal law and state law enforcement actions. Thus, the providers must respond within 21 days with a plan on how to comply with the laws. Interstellar Visitor Caught on Camera The Hubble Space Telescope of the fastest comet ever observed, moving through our solar system at 130,000 mph, after traveling the universe for hundreds of millions of years. NASA discovered the 3I/ATLAS comet last month and determined that it was from interstellar space, witnessed within our solar system. NASA said 3I/ATLAS should remain visible to telescopes through September before passing too close to the sun, reappearing by early December for renewed observations. List: Price of Speeding Tickets by State Drivers going 10 mph over the posted speed limit can expect to pay the highest fines in California, Arizona, Nevada, and Texas, according to this list of by state. A recent study analyzed 2024 data on average fines and standard court fees across each state, ranking California as the highest for speeding costs at $234. Arizona followed closely at $231, with Nevada at $223, and Texas at $223. New Mexico and Nebraska have the lowest minimum fines at $25, followed by Montana and North Dakota at $40. The national average is $130, while the median value is slightly lower at $121. . | The Flyover Is Now Reader-Owned—And That Changes Everything We're not just reporting the news—we're rebuilding trust in it. Here are five of the top reasons why now is the time to . We’ve always said: We serve our readers, not corporate bosses. Now, we’re putting that into action. The Flyover is now reader-owned , which means you can of what we believe is one of the most trusted news brands in America. Here’s why that matters: No corporate ownership. We don’t answer to VC boardrooms or hedge funds. We answer to you —our readers. No celebrity journalists. You won’t find our writers chasing fame or followers. Our editors and reporters work behind the scenes , focused on facts, not likes. We're building the Flyover brand , not personal brands. Fact-first, not flashy. Legacy media has lost trust. And they’ve earned it. We’re here to replace that lost trust with clear, accurate, common-sense news for common-sense Americans. Humility still matters. We don’t pretend to be perfect. If we get something wrong, we own it and fix it. That’s the promise. We aren't about ego. We're about building something better—together. With a minimum investment of just $750 ($2/share) you can become a co-owner of The Flyover and help reshape American news from the ground up. We believe the people who value the news should have a stake in how it’s made. name: Troy Downing
subject: Are you ready for KICKOFF, Peter,?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I’m NOT tired of winning. Are you?

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDgwOV8xRC1HRC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2ODQ5MzEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA4MDlfMUQtR0QuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjg0OTMxLTI4OTkifQ/CXyccRN63u3ynI_YxOms0w)Hey Peter,
It’s football season again in America, and I couldn’t be more excited.
When I’m in the stands this fall with my family — hotdog in hand, anthem in the air — I’ll be soaking in just how amazing this country is.
I was just a kid born to a single mom in a small town.
**I never thought I'd end up a teacher, then lead a tech start-up, then fly combat rescue helicopters, before eventually becoming a MAGA Republican in Congress.**
_It hasn't been easy. But it's been worth it thanks to _people like you_. _
**This summer, we saw:** 🟢 The lowest illegal immigration numbers in years.
🟢 The first June budget surplus in two decades.🟢 And a renewed belief that America’s comeback is real.President Trump lit up the scoreboard, and I’m here to make sure we don’t fumble the momentum.

This fall, as we kick off a new season for America, I’m asking for your help.
[If you share my gratitude for this country, would you consider supporting my campaign to help advance the Trump agenda down the field?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDgwOV8xRC1HRC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2ODQ5MzEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA4MDlfMUQtR0QuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjg0OTMxLTI4OTkifQ/IwnrVxC8ArHj09OiQhM9UA)[KEEP THE DRIVE ALIVE
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDgwOV8xRC1HRC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2ODQ5MzEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA4MDlfMUQtR0QuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjg0OTMxLTI4OTkifQ/Xlwt9N47AgdBIFtHfELLjA)Thank you for being part of my team.

Best,
Troy Downing| |

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1946, the [last Confederate reunion](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2SgyAUxfGnwU4Hrh-EgmIbu2y7pXOFa2QGNQN3Q3z7HfMKW_2r8yvOz326Y4hhf3zjRpbfyzHtVHIkZkqTpy0v6Chiyb-BC2HkNVDmCST0tbzV0kweQzynrvJ2lt6oiqzSfadbDXqoVtujuxnfQu_1sCBIZWZH1GoDepCoZRXshcmbNEpJpbrG-Hkm5RyCdx0sIDpJPvCRGl6J6Y15iefxotS4Y6uiXZmfWbRfAkYBYyml4bziscewU3Okh4Dxs6o9nvV8XhEw0s7pat-aKln_LCHGkActOvnYMMQPzv-75GXhLwAA__8uqXZW) was held at Camp Ben McCulloch in Hays County. The annual reunion was organized in 1896 and drew over 5,000 veterans at its peak. It's Little League season and Texas' own Needville team is playing in the [Junior semifinal today](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO6yAQAL8Gd4lgARsKiic9ucu1V1prWGIkHEdmEyd_f8r9wrVTzEjzfZkuWGq5Xb9wpcCvvE03OlolZtqnRGvLGKni0R6FD8LKS6HGE0iwJ-lO0k8JS31PpkthlsmrjoIarBn0AEPfLcFlNeuYLPpsMaIFl8BaFwGlApliV8JHJp30SkmlzNmneSYVI0KKBjIIIykV3vYzL8T0wpbre3vSfo7b2tWwMN-b0P8EjALG14cKGPO80I41CRgbIz-agFF5q3vtNPS9h945aQahxyb0f9N3e0j3o9RaWj8II68rlvpb4L99eQb4CQAA__8fynSG). A win will put them in the Junior League World Series title game tomorrow. Let us know in our _Poll_ below if you've ever watched a Little League championship game.
Today, [Service Plus Home Warranty](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O4yAUQOGnwV0suGBjFxS7irxVstqdkTId4ucSo8FxZEhI3n6UeYXpj77inA76YGKKl_PRLKjKI6z6gjUnLAU37XHJwThMpuZbLBVNKnPEXDRQ6HZ02NFRexPTU4vGK0v9yBpUTHZCcgmyb2bVizCIMVjmO06d5J3BwY8cZWCy44NtonphdKAjY5Qx0Y7eWmTOGfBOQAAiKPpY1q0tMxZ8mBzSc73j1rp1aZKaS7lmwn8RmAhMtda2bu4zXmxKr4LABH_YwNg_6AlM-9Pb-Pv_8RXzyW1oSryjjp7wfdf3ciDQ55tlhO_fP6a_zab8tcaUYu4lEfS8mPitNuVnt-4KvgIAAP__G_B7zw) is sponsoring us and offering a special summer sale to our readers.

## Paxton Files Suit Against 13 House Democrats
Attorney General Ken Paxton [filed a lawsuit](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHO4yAUhE9jd1hAiIkLim3cZdstrWd4ttFiiOAl2LdfJcqe4O-m-DSa-f7cpzv44OP6G3Y0dCxpilhLQCLMk8O9LGAxQC1PTxUh0Oax0CS5vDJ-Y3yYHPhwTqp1ZuZuEC0aoa9KX7TUfbuZWaHictHK9QOKAQQXqLSe3e1ir72E1pt3Gb_xQQguhOoGN88orAXprJKLbBRH5ynljjYkPKAs4UwvzJ1NexvMRvQozeVXI8dGjrXW7gMBUcoRzxUjZgjdml6NHN_vGjlmDAgF3_E_x74g-4uRPeCgFNniAxa2-UIpe8u-Hhis4GMh5nBPNgOx_IxQ4Sys2EQHK2ifGVnKDnObjXtUH4IvvW4UX3fw4bOcfub7ZeS_AAAA___0o5wh) Friday to remove 13 absent House Democrats from their seats as the Texas House met again without a quorum due to Democrats who'd left the state. Paxton also brought suit Friday [against Beto O'Rourke ](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAQRb_G7rBgQmK7oNgm3dt2S2uAcYIehgjGIf77VaLdL3jdLY6uzr1_vpYvDDGk22_cyPBrzUuiViMxU1k8bXVFRxFb3QM3wsj3QJUXkHAWchJyXjyGeCy698ZKP6uejBrPejyNMF76u9F2ulgAkODOMGk9gVZ4mlatT7Ob1rEP5l0mJzkrJZXSw-ytJeUcgncaVui0JB84l4HvxPTCusYjP6kMLm99NHfmR-1Ovzq4dnBtrQ0fCJlzSXTcKFHBONzys4Pre10H10KRsNI7_ufEP1B8UxIPfHFOou5URcmWCou1YHKhilzyXr5JWOIsbAmWqvC0ZVeQRdkTNjyqCNuDPImPSV-Mf7QQY6iXsdPytmGIH3n-2eVPA38DAAD__7jJnEw)and his political organization for "unlawful fundraising activity" that could potentially pay fines owed by the missing Democrats. [Gov. Greg Abbott ](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2upDAQhE8DmZFt_gMHm5C9TTdEjd2GlgxGdg_M3H7FXOFlJZX0qer79zP_AAU61r-wo-G3j_OBdw7IjGl2uGcPFgPc-UV8IwTeCDPPWupWyEHIcXZA4TM3pTOLdKMq0ai-bfq6131Xbgaw7gbowCvt0S8KAJRFlLWDUbbNWJJ5YHKQo1JSqaYa3bKgsha0s432umgkOuKYKt6Q8Q3Zh0-8MFU27mUwG_OZi_pPoadCT_d9V8dinxdPX-jpjIGYbC70hAEtUzye_CWJNV5iTbgKWJbILPZ4YRawn-JMmPMroXC4R5uAs_ABnUjoKHMiy3SsItkDtK7bQZXJuPOmECh3fdHIdQcK34n8O7GX0f8DAAD__2JhklA)said he would call “special session after special session after special session with the same agenda items,” suggesting Democrats would not be able to wait out the bill becoming law. House Speaker Dustin Burrows ordered that absent lawmakers' salaries be cut by 30% starting today, and required them to collect per diem checks in person. The 50-plus Democrats breaking quorum were already facing [$500 fines](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO6yAURL_G7rAAE2MXFK9xl9duaV3gOkaLTRZuQvL3K-cXthtppKOZ83VdrhBiOG7_YUdDrzUtB9YSkQjz4nEvKziMUMsjUEWItAUstEguL4yPjE-LhxDfi2q9sdxPokUj9EXpXks9tJux2k5gxxEUDP0gRa_Bei2UuyDoCWQbzAnjI5-E4EKobvLWonAOpHdKrrJRHH2glDvakPAFZY3v9MTcubS30WxE99L0_xo5N3KutXaHdeeLs2_kfE8xUHClkTNGdBTSceY1HHA4LKxiuG3sA2Ye9-QyUGEuFSrs55HyY2c2I3wz8J5ld4CUfT8NbTb-XkOMoQy6Ufy2Q4ifSfQ3kU8jfwMAAP__WjWLQQ) for each day’s absence.
## Penny Tax Proposal Dies in Chaos
Harris County Judge Lina Hidalgo’s tax hike proposal for early childhood education fell through Thursday evening amid a [chaotic commissioners’ hearing](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGymzAQRb8GuvVIQs8yBUUaupc2JbPSLqBEIEZaG_P3GecXUt-Ze86cX9_TN8YU9-UnbjzIe87TzmdNLMJlIt7qjIETnvUZ5WRMskauMhllvkA9QPUTYUzXZFsavKJetzxo92Vd54y7t-vQkem9xpm9R697F4LtvLOzexAiOd3G4XOmHqrXWmltbz15zzoENBSsmU1jFVOUXG6ysvAb65yu_OJyC3lr07CKHLXpfjRmbMyIPujuszRmPHKVxowrlhIrhPzc5YLfT1oYUtwR1kiYlgwVrwoH7_sFgm84sFYmOPMzESwZJJ9YqMIf5iPuC4Q1JgpYGI6Sl4JbBZxTxg9LO3tX9-7RmLEtAx1nTCnWu2usWjaM6Z-z_F_p12D-BgAA__9tLpbN), which included children Hidalgo invited to chant for votes in favor of the initiative. Hidalgo interrupted other commissioners on multiple occasions, saying, "There are so many falsehoods, and kids are here listening,” and eventually stormed out of the proceedings. The proposed “[penny tax](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGupCAUQL8GOw3cYUQKim3s3rZbGoTrcBMUA9fnm7_fzP7C1ic5Jzl_vpYvT5mO12-_o-OfrSwH3i0jM9Yl4t42HzD7u13EN_rMibDxAhKevZx6aZfoKb8X3UW3ymhVh06ZpzYPA2bskjNPP4bRwjoFZexjm0A_tAlBa2NXXENH7iOTk7RKSaX0YOO6ogrBQwwaNhBaYiQudeCEjD--bfldvrEOoexddon5bOLxS8AsYL7vewipluNDBcxnycQUmoDZV6aQUcCcfK3U-lCug999psP3iaLP8VX6cvF61cY9yEkaBXY409lVF8-bcqY2GqHla_eU__X5_659O_gbAAD__3SQgz0)” would have added a $10 annual tax for every $100,000 of home valuation for residents to fund a free childcare service for kids four and under. With the hearing dissolved, Hidalgo’s proposal missed the deadline for a vote to place the measure on November’s ballot. The childcare program has funding to operate until December 2026, according to Hidalgo.
## List: Wealthiest Suburbs in Texas
West University Place near Houston is the [wealthiest suburb](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOszAQRk9jOpA9MRgKF39Dl7_dEg32ANYaiPAkTm6_gmIvsN0UT_P0vq_7cMcQwzb_x5Usv6d92CinSMx0DJ7WNKGjiDk9A2fCyEugxANIqEvZlrIbPIb4GXTh7Sh9pwqyytTa3AyYplhs4yZputYRTlqZpnOoJLYtNHXdGgJVBHs-k63slJJK6arz40jKOQTvNEwgtCQfeD8qXojpjWmKn_1FR-X2tYh2YX4kcfsnoBfQ55yreR9x-w7bfCBTOjEB_bpv9DmBq-L3OHPK9Byfx5jKsJWXQEBfHNY_cogxpMYILecVQ7yM_LedXhZ-AgAA__-oSn75) in Texas, with an average annual income of $409,677 per household, according to a recent real estate analysis. Penny Tax Proposal Dies in Chaos Harris County Judge Lina Hidalgo’s tax hike proposal for early childhood education fell through Thursday evening amid a , which included children Hidalgo invited to chant for votes in favor of the initiative. Hidalgo interrupted other commissioners on multiple occasions, saying, "There are so many falsehoods, and kids are here listening,” and eventually stormed out of the proceedings. The proposed “” would have added a $10 annual tax for every $100,000 of home valuation for residents to fund a free childcare service for kids four and under. With the hearing dissolved, Hidalgo’s proposal missed the deadline for a vote to place the measure on November’s ballot. The childcare program has funding to operate until December 2026, according to Hidalgo. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T90eea578-9a5d-41cb-8f5e-d72193b2b138/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Derek Dooley
subject: A football coach in politics?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dooley for Georiga
body:
Friend,

A lot of you may be sitting there wondering what in the world a
football coach is doing jumping into politics._ AND HERE’S THE
TRUTH:_

_I’m not running to polish a resume, gain the next promotion, or
climb the political ladder._

I’M RUNNING BECAUSE I LOVE THIS STATE AND I LOVE THIS COUNTRY.
[https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-amc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_amc&utm_campaign=20250807_not-your-typical-candidate_dd&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=26]
#
[https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-amc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_amc&utm_campaign=20250807_not-your-typical-candidate_dd&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=26]
For nearly 30 years, I coached young people chasing big dreams.
Football was my passion, and I used it to lead, serve, and teach what
it means to show up for one another.

BUT NOW, I LOOK AROUND AND SEE A COUNTRY WHERE THE AMERICAN DREAM
FEELS MORE OUT OF REACH THAN EVER. I’VE WATCHED AS JON OSSOFF HELPED
JOE BIDEN AND THE FAR-LEFT TRY TO TAKE AMERICA OFF A CLIFF... AND
ALMOST SUCCEEDED.

_And I refuse to sit on the sidelines and watch Jon Ossoff and the
Democrats destroy the American Dream._
THAT’S WHY I’M RUNNING FOR U.S. SENATE AND I’M ASKING YOU TO
JOIN ME TODAY. >>
[https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-amc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_amc&utm_campaign=20250807_not-your-typical-candidate_dd&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=26]

JOIN THE MOVEMENT: CHIP IN $26 TODAY
[https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-amc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_amc&utm_campaign=20250807_not-your-typical-candidate_dd&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=26]

I’m not a politician.

I’M A DAD, A HUSBAND, AND A PROUD GEORGIAN WHO’S NEVER BEEN AFRAID
OF A TOUGH FIGHT.

AND RIGHT NOW GEORGIA NEEDS A GEORGIA FIRST FIGHTER WHO CAN WIN
[https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-amc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_amc&utm_campaign=20250807_not-your-typical-candidate_dd&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=26]..._
not another professional politician like Jon Ossoff who puts his big
money donors and progressives ahead of the people who sent him to
Washington._ #
[https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-amc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_amc&utm_campaign=20250807_not-your-typical-candidate_dd&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=26]

HERE’S MY PLAN AS GEORGIA’S NEXT SENATOR:

✔️ Partner with President Trump and support his
America First agenda from day one
✔️Secure the border and deport criminal illegals
✔️ Reverse Biden’s reckless policies and Make
America Affordable Again
✔️ Pass term limits — 12 years is more than enough
✔️ Stop the woke madness and protect girls’ sport
✔️ Balance the budget by cutting spending and taxes

But more than anything...

I’LL FIGHT FOR OUR KIDS. FOR THEIR FUTURE. FOR THEIR FREEDOM.

As a dad of three, I’m deeply worried about the world we’re
handing them. Social media pressures, mental health struggles, rising
costs, and a culture that’s confused about what it even means to be
American.

_This fight is personal to me and it always has been. _
IF YOU BELIEVE GEORGIA DESERVES A LEADER WHO’LL SHOW UP, DO THE
WORK, AND FIGHT FOR REAL CHANGE — I HOPE YOU’LL STAND WITH ME
TODAY.
[https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-amc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_amc&utm_campaign=20250807_not-your-typical-candidate_dd&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=26]

DONATE
[https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-amc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_amc&utm_campaign=20250807_not-your-typical-candidate_dd&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=26]

Let’s go win this together.

All in,
Derek Dooley

-------------------------

JOIN DEREK DOOLEY’S TEAM

#
[https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-amc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_amc&utm_campaign=20250807_not-your-typical-candidate_dd&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=26]

DEREK DOOLEY IS RUNNING FOR U.S. SENATE BECAUSE WE NEED A GEORGIA
FIRST FIGHTER.

_Someone who is not afraid to stand up to the Washington elites and
put the future of hardworking families FIRST._

He’s not a politician. He’s a coach, husband, dad, and a
conservative outsider who spent nearly 30 years on the football field
helping young people chase the American Dream.

NOW, HE’S READY TO TAKE THAT SAME FIGHT TO WASHINGTON AND PROTECT
THE FUTURE OF EVERY HARDWORKING AMERICAN.
[https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-amc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_amc&utm_campaign=20250807_not-your-typical-candidate_dd&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=26]

While professional politician Jon Ossoff rubber-stamps the Left’s
radical agenda...

DEREK IS STEPPING UP TO DEFEND GEORGIA VALUES, RESTORE COMMON SENSE,
AND BRING REAL LEADERSHIP TO THE U.S. SENATE.

_But this will be one of the toughest races in the country and he
can’t do it without you by his side._

WILL YOU STEP UP AND SHOW YOUR SUPPORT WITH A DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT
TODAY?
[https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-amc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_amc&utm_campaign=20250807_not-your-typical-candidate_dd&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=26]

DONATE
[https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-amc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_amc&utm_campaign=20250807_not-your-typical-candidate_dd&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=26]

Thank you,
— Team Dooley

Paid for by Dooley for Georiga

196 Alps Rd Ste 2-147
Athens, GA 30606

Privacy Policy [https://www.dooleyforgeorgia.com/disclaimer]

Unsubscribe: https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=309849&trkid=834258391&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: WTOK looks at what School Choice might mean for Mississippi
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/wtokinterview?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend, **I’m thrilled to share that momentum for School Choice in Mississippi is growing!** Governor Tate Reeves, Speaker Jason White, and even the White House are championing this transformative opportunity to empower parents and enhance education for our children.

**This week, WTOK TV aired an in-depth segment exploring how School Choice could benefit families across our state.** I had the pleasure of discussing this important topic with news anchor Anna-Hope Bigham. You can watch our conversation by clicking on the image below:
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=92353d095e&e=5703353baa)
---
| Thank you for your continued support as we work to put parents in the driver’s seat of their children’s education.

Have a great weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=59c091753a&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| Ps. Each week, MCPP publishes a column, which normally appears in various newspapers across the state and indeed, America. **Since the start of this year, these weekly columns have been viewed over 92 million times. **Below is a breakdown of the stats on our top columns.
---
|
---
As Mississippi’s free market think tank, we are reaching a lot of people across the state and America.
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=81673474bf) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=81673474bf).

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Hitting the road
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
If Republicans don’t show up, then I will.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250809-1-b&t=1&akid=10758%2E3935704%2E7Prd8c)
---
Friends, it’s Gabby Giffords and I’m hitting the road.
I’ve been hosting town halls across the country to demand real change and hold Republicans accountable on their own turf. If you’re with me, will you pitch in $3 to help GIFFORDS PAC win back the House and Senate? Contribute here:
**[https://go.giffords.org/go/townhall](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250809-1-b&t=2&akid=10758%2E3935704%2E7Prd8c)**
Too many members of Congress are hiding from their constituents and refusing to hold town halls.
They can’t own up to the fact that they proudly voted for Donald Trump’s terrible budget bill — which cuts Medicaid, guts SNAP, and makes it easier to buy dangerous gun silencers.
Well, if Republicans don’t show up, _then I will_.
Hundreds of people showed up for our first stop, and there are plenty more events to come. With your support, we will keep holding events across the country and vote them out in 2026.
[**Are you with me? Chip in $3 or another amount to GIFFORDS PAC today — we’ll put it immediately to work to reach voters everywhere.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250809-1-b&t=3&akid=10758%2E3935704%2E7Prd8c)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
