---

* * *

Illinois farmers are facing uncertainty due to the Trump Administration’s reckless tariffs, lack of small business support, and canceled agriculture programs. I joined the IL Farm Bureau Roundtable to hear directly from those on the ground and brainstorm real solutions and stability.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113030958/562410221/-550958566?refcode=em-8.9.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDU2MDkwNi0zYTc1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FQZCVhoAHE_z-36WB0F2zwLgAOYJHJ8RoyXjoiOtaQY=)
I spoke with folks in Edwardsville and Champaign about the MAGA GOP abandoning working families – and how we must demand better. This was one of my many stops on my summer travels meeting face-to-face with IL-13 communities who want to hear how I’m standing up for them.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113030959/562410222/-550958566?refcode=em-8.9.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDU2MDkwNi0zYTc1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FQZCVhoAHE_z-36WB0F2zwLgAOYJHJ8RoyXjoiOtaQY=)
Not only are farmers and working people under attack, but LGBTQ+ folks are facing real threats. I was honored to meet with this community and hear what I can do in Washington to ensure their rights are respected and protected – not taken away.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113030960/562410223/-550958566?refcode=em-8.9.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDU2MDkwNi0zYTc1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FQZCVhoAHE_z-36WB0F2zwLgAOYJHJ8RoyXjoiOtaQY=)
Despite the troubling actions by this administration in the last weeks and months, I’m not giving up – not now, not ever. I’m energized by the folks I’ve met this summer who feel the same way and are mobilizing their communities.

I hope you feel as inspired as I do by Central and Southern Illinois. I’ll continue to keep pushing at home and back in Washington to stand up for working families and the thousands of Illinoisans under threat.

Thank you, and have a great weekend!

Nikki

name: Team FLHP
subject: They’re targeting veterans now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
Add your name to demand nationwide abortion access |
#
---
Washington Republicans have taken the first step to strip abortion access from veterans receiving care through the VA — even in cases of rape, incest, or when their health is at risk. This came straight out of the far-right Project 2025 playbook, a sweeping plan to roll back reproductive freedom and other fundamental rights nationwide. Right now, they’re targeting the VA. But this is just the beginning of a broader strategy to see how far they can push their dangerous agenda. It’s wrong. It’s cruel. And it’s dangerous. But here in Michigan, we know better. **When reproductive rights were under threat, we organized, re-electing Governor Whitmer and passing a ballot initiative enshrining abortion rights into Michigan’s constitution.** Even after Proposal 3 passed, Governor Whitmer continued to expand access to care, precisely because she knew what was coming. **But no state is safe if extremists succeed in bringing their national agenda to every corner of the country.** That’s why we need you to get loud and raise your voice today. **[Everyone deserves access to safe, legal abortion care, no matter where they live. Add your name now if you believe abortion access should be protected nationwide — including for veterans.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113031131/562410667/1078224601?contactdata=ucQaEQnXY+gyVB5UzNL4uE+LJJX6hRP0tiY4+2sxc7YGuLyhzuB32Tu4dUSlZ7ngo+IxivqPwpvlhsQITpxrGen0SVFul87WjjmImnN5m0LKQQ9hHfQaS5hU1nqJRyScXqcCo03PvOXOQfIbqFBopw==&refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250809_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2U5MDNkMjktM2E3NS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5VQI5S71NpehrMUi0GhEITOoDW6uAC_36nd9Xp6Xt-U=&emci=3d903d29-3a75-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3e903d29-3a75-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1028753)** | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113031132/562410668/1078224601?contactdata=ucQaEQnXY+gyVB5UzNL4uE+LJJX6hRP0tiY4+2sxc7YGuLyhzuB32Tu4dUSlZ7ngo+IxivqPwpvlhsQITpxrGen0SVFul87WjjmImnN5m0LKQQ9hHfQaS5hU1nqJRyScXqcCo03PvOXOQfIbqFBopw==&refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250809_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2U5MDNkMjktM2E3NS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5VQI5S71NpehrMUi0GhEITOoDW6uAC_36nd9Xp6Xt-U=&emci=3d903d29-3a75-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3e903d29-3a75-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1028753)

name: Heather G.
subject: Your supporter status enclosed:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Can you help us beat the summer slump?
| Hi friend, my name is Heather and I help run the Voter Protection Project!

**I’m reaching out because I noticed that you have yet to confirm your supporter status to help us stop Trump and elect Democrats across the country.**

Summer months are always the toughest for fundraising — and with our entire Democracy at stake, _we absolutely can’t afford to fall behind._

**There’s no better time to step up.** Trump is threatening to serve an unprecedented third term. MAGA Republicans are building their warchest to defeat Democrats in 2026. Grassroots support from Democrats like you is vital right now.

[So today, I hope you’ll help us kick off August strong: Will you confirm your status as a top Democrat so we can take back the House and Senate from the MAGA majority and save our Democracy? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92924?t=6&akid=20883%2E878179%2E2ZfmLt) | [CONFIRM YOUR SUPPORTER STATUS »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92924?t=7&akid=20883%2E878179%2E2ZfmLt)
---
Thank you for all your help!

Heather G.
Executive Director
The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20883%2E878179%2E2ZfmLt). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20883%2E878179%2E2ZfmLt).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20883%2E878179%2E2ZfmLt) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=20883%2E878179%2E2ZfmLt). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20883%2E878179%2E2ZfmLt)

Peter,

ICYMI: Did you get a chance to grab your [ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250805-stickers-movement.REupi1&refcode=em20250809-1469&t=1002&akid=1469%2E342411%2EHfLaZ_ ]Squad sticker?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250805-stickers-movement.REupi1&refcode=em20250809-1469&t=1003&akid=1469%2E342411%2EHfLaZ_ ]Squad Sticker

AOC, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida are leading the charge for bold,
progressive change in Congress. They’re not afraid to take on the
far-right, corporate power, or the status quo — and they’re doing it
without a dime from corporate PACs.

That’s why they rely on grassroots supporters like you to power their
campaigns, grow this movement, and push for real change.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250805-stickers-movement.REupi1&refcode=em20250809-1469&t=1004&akid=1469%2E342411%2EHfLaZ_ ]Right now, when you chip in just $5, we’ll send you a FREE Squad
sticker to say thank you for your support. Chip in $7 or more, and we’ll
send you two!

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250805-stickers-movement.REupi1&refcode=em20250809-1469&t=1005&akid=1469%2E342411%2EHfLaZ_ ]GET MY STICKER

These aren’t just stickers — they’re a symbol of solidarity and a sign
that you stand with leaders who put people over profits, justice over
personal agendas, and community over corporations.

Whether it’s on your laptop, your water bottle, or your car bumper, your
Squad sticker shows the world exactly where you stand.

name: EMILYs List
subject: RE: Texas Democrats
body:
These women are putting it all on the line for our democracy. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113031512/562411881/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE817_20250809_TexasDemsRS_ALL&sourceid=1056787&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTgwYjhlYS0zOTc1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xD6COLY7UhdjC9QPgtTESYQQtNjAhAuHj6o77dUoPf0=) Hi Peter,

Last week, more than 50 Texas legislators — including 13 EMILYs List women — did something extraordinary: they _left the state_ , risking arrest under Attorney General Ken Paxton's penalties, to break quorum and delay the passage of a devastating and blatantly undemocratic GOP gerrymandering bill. | [DEFEND DEMOCRACY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113031513/562411883/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE817_20250809_TexasDemsRS_ALL&sourceid=1056787&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTgwYjhlYS0zOTc1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xD6COLY7UhdjC9QPgtTESYQQtNjAhAuHj6o77dUoPf0=)
---
The GOP's gerrymandering assaults every community in the state. It would make 30 of Texas's 38 congressional districts _safe Republican seats_ , **netting Republicans five more seats in the U.S. House** , despite more than 42% of Texans voting for Kamala Harris last year.

This bill is disenfranchisement, plain and simple. Trump is pushing Republican Gov. Greg Abbott to pass it because he knows how unpopular their party's governance is — and he knows the only way Republicans will hold the U.S. House in 2026 is by rigging maps, suppressing votes, and _stealing_ seats.

Now, these courageous Texas women are putting it all on the line for our democracy. We're _immensely_ proud to have helped elect them, and we're so grateful for their bravery in the face of threats and coercion from their state's Republican leaders. They are proof that we're not powerless: even in red states, Democrats can do their part to stop the Trump takeover.

These women are why we do the work we do.
****[**This fight is far from over, Peter. We are hard at work to help elect more leaders who will show up for their constituents, resist fascism, and defend democracy when it matters most. You can support our work with a donation now:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113031515/562411884/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE817_20250809_TexasDemsRS_ALL&sourceid=1056787&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTgwYjhlYS0zOTc1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xD6COLY7UhdjC9QPgtTESYQQtNjAhAuHj6o77dUoPf0=)****

clean_body: These women are putting it all on the line for our democracy. | = Hi Peter, Last week, more than 50 Texas legislators — including 13 EMILYs List women — did something extraordinary: they left the state , risking arrest under Attorney General Ken Paxton's penalties, to break quorum and delay the passage of a devastating and blatantly undemocratic GOP gerrymandering bill. | = The GOP's gerrymandering assaults every community in the state. It would make 30 of Texas's 38 congressional districts safe Republican seats , netting Republicans five more seats in the U.S. House , despite more than 42% of Texans voting for Kamala Harris last year. This bill is disenfranchisement, plain and simple. Trump is pushing Republican Gov. Greg Abbott to pass it because he knows how unpopular their party's governance is — and he knows the only way Republicans will hold the U.S. House in 2026 is by rigging maps, suppressing votes, and stealing seats. Now, these courageous Texas women are putting it all on the line for our democracy. We're immensely proud to have helped elect them, and we're so grateful for their bravery in the face of threats and coercion from their state's Republican leaders. They are proof that we're not powerless: even in red states, Democrats can do their part to stop the Trump takeover. These women are why we do the work we do. **=** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = In solidarity, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. Hey, SO sorry to bother you on a Saturday. This couldn't wait.
Our August fundraising is off to a rough start. Our fundraising projections had us far outpacing where we’re at right now and the team is a little on edge.
Look, August is when campaigns usually lose a little steam. But that’s not true for my opponent. Jason Miyares is continuing to add on to his millions raised because MAGA billionaires are investing in this race, and we have no choice but to keep up our pace.
I hate asking on weekends. I know you've got family time, errands, all that.
But we can't afford to take a single day off. Not when we're this close.
Miyares won by 0.81% last time. This race will come down to who fights harder right now, in August, when it matters most – and I’m ready to fight.
Can you help us catch up? Even $10 makes a difference. Here's what you need to know and what you can do to help save the Postal Service.

1\. **The Post Office is enshrined in the US Constitution and created by an act of Congress.** _Trump’s efforts to unilaterally dismantle it are unconstitutional!_

2\. **Privatizing USPS would mean higher costs, slower delivery, and the loss of universal service** — especially for rural communities, seniors, and people with disabilities.

3\. **It’s a threat to our elections.** Millions depend on the USPS to vote by mail. Weakening it makes it harder for everyday Americans to participate in our democracy.

We can’t allow Trump to dismantle the USPS and privatize it completely.

**[As New Dems fight to defend working Americans’ access to the USPS, we need you to have our back! Can you add your name to defend the USPS? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113032365/562414847/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250809_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mjk4NTk0ZC0zYjc1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bKRm6pnhn7cvzrKPgIA708ugTzlf54EhyMpNDvOQnpc=&emci=bb7b5ddd-8f74-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=7298594d-3b75-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)**

name: Rural Update via Team Jena
subject: Trump’s cuts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250809-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250809-email]
Peter,
In April, the Trump Administration cancelled crucial federal funding for the Partnerships for Climate-Smart Commodities – a program that aimed to help farmers implement climate-friendly practices through funding and technical assistance.These cuts included $917 million to projects in Colorado, and for many families, these aren’t just numbers on a page. They are lifelines—funding for local farms, small businesses, and infrastructure that keeps rural communities strong.Jena Griswold knows exactly what’s at stake. She grew up in a working-class family in Estes Park, where she saw firsthand how critical investments are to keeping rural economies alive. Her family’s story is the story of so many Coloradans—working hard, facing challenges, and relying on the community to get by.As Colorado’s next Attorney General, Jena will stand up to Donald Trump’s attacks and attempts to harm the Colorado way of life.This election is about standing up for Colorado families. Can you chip in today to help elect Jena Griswold as the Attorney General who will fight for rural Colorado? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250809-email]
Thanks for being in this fight with us.— Team Jena
Follow Jena Online:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/ [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/] https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold [https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold] https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social [https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social]

clean_body: [] Peter, In April, the Trump Administration cancelled crucial federal funding for the Partnerships for Climate-Smart Commodities – a program that aimed to help farmers implement climate-friendly practices through funding and technical assistance.These cuts included $917 million to projects in Colorado, and for many families, these aren’t just numbers on a page. They are lifelines—funding for local farms, small businesses, and infrastructure that keeps rural communities strong.Jena Griswold knows exactly what’s at stake. She grew up in a working-class family in Estes Park, where she saw firsthand how critical investments are to keeping rural economies alive. Her family’s story is the story of so many Coloradans—working hard, facing challenges, and relying on the community to get by.As Colorado’s next Attorney General, Jena will stand up to Donald Trump’s attacks and attempts to harm the Colorado way of life.This election is about standing up for Colorado families. Can you chip in today to help elect Jena Griswold as the Attorney General who will fight for rural Colorado? [] Thanks for being in this fight with us.— Team Jena Follow Jena Online: [] [] [] [] [] Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent. Jena for Colorado P.O. name: Jeff Merkley
subject: We can’t sit idly by while Republicans systematically undermine the right to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
From limiting access to the ballot box and Vote by Mail to rolling back protections that ensure fair elections, these efforts are part of a broader strategy to cling to power by undermining the democratic process.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113033654/562420095/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODU5OTczZi0zZTc1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vnf7D3CvtRuVTXK__FHG86ai-RmXR-Gu-KH2wzlg0lk=&emci=504fecfe-c273-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0859973f-3e75-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7731215)

| | Right now, Republican lawmakers are escalating their attacks on voting rights — pushing restrictive policies designed to make it harder for everyday Americans to vote. From limiting access to the ballot box and Vote by Mail to rolling back protections that ensure fair elections, these efforts are part of a broader strategy to cling to power by undermining the democratic process. This is exactly the kind of voter suppression and partisan power grab that the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act is meant to stop. **That's why I've joined my Senate colleagues in reintroducing this critical legislation** — to restore and update the Voting Rights Act of 1965, which federal courts have chipped away at over the past decade. Time and time again, John Lewis put his life on the line to defend every American's right to vote. To honor his legacy — and to protect our democracy — we must act. We won't sit idly by while Republicans wage an assault on the right to vote and try to dismantle our democracy. Since the Supreme Court's 2013 decision in _Shelby County v. Holder_ ended federal oversight of discriminatory voting laws, we've seen a tidal wave of voter suppression. **We need to pass this bill. Now more than ever, we need to protect the right to vote. And we need your voice in this fight.** Onward! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

body:
Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=iyBBf4LdG%2BIG4njEVG2yzLAZNCRcyxQde1msUZ%2B0hYAsZusr6KE1ikuyJx%2BaTG4Y4L56fSJWUTi5cEW0lE8YKWr08DmDvYXbmfiq8aKpiPEdA2ybVwmwqoKRCUJ8t1%2Fdtd7HFaSpQK2ls0SOl%2FNolBWxyEVMUNWk7d6tFZSIvosNtESiG5Bsuk5x82iklZJc418PujUhLrgx7m%2BUcSgS%2FW00vRK6Ep8jqWnVVPO2FaQFamaku5lwWSDWCQOYSJzuAzmTcPTQxnbPXZAFZgH9hPlJ2CpY3QpcjzY6n8GrrjqTuBlOSIPM%2FlSj7czScoCQvWmNqhh%2BaruBidcbftBBzVmaywUv32D5cF%2FPRZwHz5c%2FYRaJQlfqoNU5TE9jftCB63E27UHpqB9yUaWIrz8QDK%2FskfRf5nBn26FqHt0wK0o%3D)

| |

Saludos, Yvette Herrell won’t be running for NM-02 again, but that doesn’t mean she’s done pushing the MAGA agenda. Donald Trump just appointed her to a cushy job in the United States Department of Agriculture — **in a role that could give her even more power to carry out his dangerous priorities, especially when it comes to our public lands.** Let me be clear: Herrell didn’t lose this seat because she strayed from Trump — she lost because voters in southern New Mexico saw what the MAGA agenda really meant for them. And now her allegiance to Trump is being rewarded — with a position that directly threatens the lands we hold dear in southern New Mexico. Trump has made it clear he wants to gut protections, roll back regulations, and hand our public lands over to his corporate allies. And now, **Yvette Herrell will be helping him do exactly that.** Our lands deserve better than political appointees carrying out MAGA marching orders. **And our people deserve leaders who put New Mexicans first — not Donald Trump.** We don’t yet know who Republicans will run for this seat — but we know what they’ll stand for: the same extreme agenda that puts corporate profits ahead of our communities, and loyalty to Trump ahead of the people of New Mexico. [Our lands deserve a champion. And NM-02 deserves real leadership rooted in truth, accountability, and service. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Saludos, Yvette Herrell won’t be running for NM-02 again, but that doesn’t mean she’s done pushing the MAGA agenda. Donald Trump just appointed her to a cushy job in the United States Department of Agriculture — in a role that could give her even more power to carry out his dangerous priorities, especially when it comes to our public lands. Let me be clear: Herrell didn’t lose this seat because she strayed from Trump — she lost because voters in southern New Mexico saw what the MAGA agenda really meant for them. And now her allegiance to Trump is being rewarded — with a position that directly threatens the lands we hold dear in southern New Mexico. Trump has made it clear he wants to gut protections, roll back regulations, and hand our public lands over to his corporate allies. And now, Yvette Herrell will be helping him do exactly that. Our lands deserve better than political appointees carrying out MAGA marching orders. And our people deserve leaders who put New Mexicans first — not Donald Trump. We don’t yet know who Republicans will run for this seat — but we know what they’ll stand for: the same extreme agenda that puts corporate profits ahead of our communities, and loyalty to Trump ahead of the people of New Mexico. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = — Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. As much as Tim Walz would have America believe that Immigration officials are the new Gestapo, it really couldn’t be further from the truth. |

Peter,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and if this is your first time hearing from me, let me introduce myself.

I was born in St. Paul, Minnesota, in 1983 and adopted by Joel and Deb Schwarze when I was six months old. I grew up in Bloomington, where hockey was more than a pastime—it was a foundation for leadership and teamwork.

After the terrorist attacks on 9/11, I felt a deep calling to serve. **On my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted as an infantryman in the United States Marine Corps. I deployed with the 1st Marine Division during Operation Iraqi Freedom, earning multiple valor and meritorious promotions awards.**

In 2013, I achieved my lifelong ambition by becoming a **Navy SEAL Officer, serving with SEAL Team Three and later joining the elite undersea-focused enterprise of U.S. Special Operations Command.** Over my 21-year military career, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, conducting combat, intelligence, and humanitarian missions.

Now, I'm stepping up to serve Minnesota in a new capacity—as a Republican candidate for U.S. Senate.

**The Stakes in This Race Are Enormous.**

I'm running against **Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor** , who is even more radical than he is. While Minneapolis was burning during the 2020 riots, she wasn't defending the people or supporting the police—she was preparing a lawsuit _**against**_ the Minneapolis Police Department.

Governor Walz wants America to believe **Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents are the Gestapo.** His words, not mine. And this is who they call a “moderate.”

So ask yourself: _**If this is what their moderates sound like, what is their real agenda?**_

**Every time the left doesn't get their way, they call Republicans Nazis.**

Every time we demand border security or want criminal illegal aliens deported, they call us bigots.

But you know better—and so do I. Enforcing immigration law is not hateful.**It's common sense**. It's about **protecting Americans**.

Peter, if you're sick of being called a Nazi because you want a secure border, then **[I’m asking you to pitch in $1, $5, or even $15 today.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c0e68991fbbb42acb94a111c2f687524&_e=mGXJZzW554kyY_MJrY78Xr_CPQQ6pOrjaD23G4DhxwBLb1d5U6gSfzEh5oNeJyyrdZ4vvROLiyBG0ambHDMF9JSqg46FxEiF6zq828rSCl0qOWXy7r-fHOLm9v0NmoFpDISIZgj8H-8fxw7PJ3Fpp1PP5SqgLzL4PhejjU78pYTGXJ4Kqd4w0CypqnKMF5At9JcSiIRVtF8Z4LZ8VGTdMNoMWNA75SEtlcX9c_tpstUIc5af0Tr8BtUDsedPH9EMWgS_jHSx-dueXl1fVW_jx_VyCUgyXMaUXHg3KVox95v89FAI-5wzz7FNB6MVvH2M8qOdcVOJbiJyHQkDjBl8S7JynrnaRUAJYYrutiFhcdzf_OhHv-XUB2A4LD0XffcxNXsMdXuAwudbG9AfvgekD8kYk2sjhFstHgis-DcpX0dg13XX56VbwOOIbQCx5_WE-ans2nd4HEsshvozKmA5yYd53RcVfpojXGv8-NCE0NoNeDUkz783tN0qp7PRbdsVgilRK5dp3ZfaTNFIfl_Ti4SZ0ui6e0zRBPJiYovFFMq-EIEXaCQGNM5aBWJeVSC2Cy4l5mqkXZW8EPYNhWfk9v9zJp_tHzld5Sxn-x8VAr-VMspOGm7U0ofiw4WpKeEKz0grtJQlQByRv2qx49yjn6FQvqbnPInwPj4-x91vOLhfJe8x_07PV1e0-_TOTwZvqQbs4n4MpumLYsxmBVeN2x-euOigchzTJasS4Ow5sBk%3D)**

**Here's What I Believe:** I believe that no one is above the law—especially criminal illegal aliens who commit rape, murder, and violence against American citizens.

I believe in a **strong border, deporting those who break our laws, and respecting the rule of law** —no exceptions, no apologies.

I believe that veterans, police officers, working families, and law-abiding Americans deserve a voice in the Senate—not professional politicians who mock us and ignore our communities.

**I've Never Run for Office Before. That's the Point.**

Unlike my opponent, I wasn't groomed for politics. I joined the military on my 18th birthday—October 2001—just weeks after the attacks on our homeland. I didn't run from duty. I ran toward it.

While Tim Walz was dodging deployments, I was deployed nine times. I fought to protect conservative American values—the ones that raised me, the ones that made this country great, and the ones that are now under daily assault.

Tim Walz hand-picked my opponent in the U.S. Senate race to be his lieutenant governor. We can’t trust him due to his past actions in the military and the governor's mansion, so it should go without saying that we can’t trust her, either.

Peter, I'm asking you for something personal today—something I never thought I'd do: **[Could you donate $10, $25, or even $50 to help me launch this campaign the right way?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c0e68991fbbb42acb94a111c2f687524&_e=mGXJZzW554kyY_MJrY78Xr_CPQQ6pOrjaD23G4DhxwBLb1d5U6gSfzEh5oNeJyyrdZ4vvROLiyBG0ambHDMF9JSqg46FxEiF6zq828rSCl0qOWXy7r-fHOLm9v0NmoFpDISIZgj8H-8fxw7PJ3Fpp1PP5SqgLzL4PhejjU78pYTGXJ4Kqd4w0CypqnKMF5At9JcSiIRVtF8Z4LZ8VGTdMNoMWNA75SEtlcX9c_tpstUIc5af0Tr8BtUDsedPH9EMfXXRyrGWzWFjxEftHaQGYIHWzxAlLm-ux3EpBbwcFJ18-Ie5drBzZSh08519Op-M8H5cZPq_eD4BnnJK7-RKntrwYMb-Ih_palIywBHz28VYmHhi2zAoEGFqQJEeNmOmIINFk1ZVBfhDWWcgpbQP_G7CAW0hfKLisfERRBf0C3jbDpO8U9latzgxG49Bczqrsn2sGwDbVmC-NOnJh_7jsH_3_SvD-0HkgfaCT33ayIGGF9vOgg-AwvW-yBtjdVuAW_VxWn9MqCNTD2xfklAn7TqHZV7DZU_3Q-ApbEJ6-DBW3l49IxZwCLU0bo45wGFNGXYrRPsTua_C2nfh16EKMX_y2PIVxLlXcJEQRmIZ5kHSkuFlP0LZByRO_QKLJ2646lgKDhoE7EBZA0nYKzCFO5NhGbxsu2yGwg4KHnC5qEh3Wn_N1TucsIOfPKjruUPOTi-weMabkQcxpNBHfFI2H6cdD9GSYv6HAA2kJXy9Yug%3D)**

clean_body: As much as Tim Walz would have America believe that Immigration officials are the new Gestapo, it really couldn’t be further from the truth. | Peter, My name is Adam Schwarze, and if this is your first time hearing from me, let me introduce myself. I was born in St. Paul, Minnesota, in 1983 and adopted by Joel and Deb Schwarze when I was six months old. I grew up in Bloomington, where hockey was more than a pastime—it was a foundation for leadership and teamwork. After the terrorist attacks on 9/11, I felt a deep calling to serve. On my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted as an infantryman in the United States Marine Corps. I deployed with the 1st Marine Division during Operation Iraqi Freedom, earning multiple valor and meritorious promotions awards. In 2013, I achieved my lifelong ambition by becoming a Navy SEAL Officer, serving with SEAL Team Three and later joining the elite undersea-focused enterprise of U.S. Special Operations Command. Over my 21-year military career, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, conducting combat, intelligence, and humanitarian missions. Now, I'm stepping up to serve Minnesota in a new capacity—as a Republican candidate for U.S. Senate. The Stakes in This Race Are Enormous. I'm running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor , who is even more radical than he is. While Minneapolis was burning during the 2020 riots, she wasn't defending the people or supporting the police—she was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police Department. Governor Walz wants America to believe Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents are the Gestapo. His words, not mine. And this is who they call a “moderate.” So ask yourself: If this is what their moderates sound like, what is their real agenda? Every time the left doesn't get their way, they call Republicans Nazis. Every time we demand border security or want criminal illegal aliens deported, they call us bigots. But you know better—and so do I. Enforcing immigration law is not hateful.It's common sense. It's about protecting Americans. Peter, if you're sick of being called a Nazi because you want a secure border, then Here's What I Believe: I believe that no one is above the law—especially criminal illegal aliens who commit rape, murder, and violence against American citizens. I believe in a strong border, deporting those who break our laws, and respecting the rule of law —no exceptions, no apologies. I believe that veterans, police officers, working families, and law-abiding Americans deserve a voice in the Senate—not professional politicians who mock us and ignore our communities. I've Never Run for Office Before. That's the Point. Unlike my opponent, I wasn't groomed for politics. I joined the military on my 18th birthday—October 2001—just weeks after the attacks on our homeland. I didn't run from duty. I ran toward it. While Tim Walz was dodging deployments, I was deployed nine times. I fought to protect conservative American values—the ones that raised me, the ones that made this country great, and the ones that are now under daily assault. Tim Walz hand-picked my opponent in the U.S. Senate race to be his lieutenant governor. We can’t trust him due to his past actions in the military and the governor's mansion, so it should go without saying that we can’t trust her, either. Peter, I'm asking you for something personal today—something I never thought I'd do: Minnesota hasn't gone Republican in a presidential race since 1976. But we're not a deep-blue state. Not yet. With Senator Tina Smith retiring, this is our moment. The seat is open. The field is fluid. And I believe—with everything in me—that if we build now, we can flip this seat, and flip the narrative. I Don't Have the Media. I Don't Have Hollywood. I Don't Have the Swamp. What I have is grit, a record of service , and hopefully, the support of patriots like you who still believe America is worth fighting for. If you're tired of watching cities like Minneapolis fall apart while liberal elites cheer it on... And if you believe we deserve leaders who've fought for this country— Then I'm humbly asking you to join my team today. Let's do this. Let's turn the tide. Let's win. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Average Americans like us already know that prices on gas, groceries, rent and childcare are only going up.
But a new jobs report underscores just how bad the economy is [https://www.cnbc.com/2025/08/04/contentious-july-jobs-report-confirms-the-us-economy-is-slowing-sharply.html] under President Trump and Congressional conservatives who promised to get our fiscal house in order. Unemployment is up, inflation is up and morale is low.
Trump didn’t like the numbers – so he’s firing the guy who compiles the country’s labor statistics. That’s what dictators do.
The American people deserve leaders who will work to fix the economy, not ones who throw tantrums when numbers don’t go their way.
It’s been awhile since I asked you to chip in . I hope I can count on your support to help restore government to leaders who value facts, people and results. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3]

subject: Trump doesn't want you to know this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
He fired climate scientists and scrubbed government websites. Here's why.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113034182/562421959/1328794144?refcode=ea.ee062520-4075-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.ee062520-4075-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVlMDYyNTIwLTQwNzUtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FZ7XE3wOUwHZlwMZ1jUysnj451urbcf6Oedo9mHM6pA=&emci=e8062520-4075-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=ee062520-4075-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)
---
| Donald Trump is launching a full-scale attack on climate science. **FIRST:** Trump fired _nearly 400_ scientists and experts working on the National Climate Assessment — our nation’s most comprehensive and trusted source for climate data. **THEN:** His administration quietly pulled down government websites that hosted these reports, hiding taxpayer-funded data that communities rely on to understand the climate crisis, prepare for its impacts, and fight back with real solutions. **NOW:** Trump's Energy Secretary says they're planning to _rewrite_ previously published climate reports because they claim the science wasn't "fair". **This isn’t about fairness. It’s about power and profit. Trump is rewriting science to protect the fossil fuel lobby that helped put him in office — no matter the cost to our planet.** That’s why the work we’re doing at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC is more urgent than ever. We're backing candidates who are leading on climate _now_ — in statehouses, city halls, school boards, and beyond — even as the federal government fails to act. **[But we can’t take on Big Oil’s billions alone. If we’re going to hold Trump and every MAGA puppet accountable for this cover up, we need people like you to act now. Will you chip in what you can before midnight to help us elect bold climate leaders? >>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113034183/562421960/2105508926?refcode=ea.ee062520-4075-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.ee062520-4075-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVlMDYyNTIwLTQwNzUtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FZ7XE3wOUwHZlwMZ1jUysnj451urbcf6Oedo9mHM6pA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113034184/562421961/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.ee062520-4075-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.ee062520-4075-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVlMDYyNTIwLTQwNzUtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FZ7XE3wOUwHZlwMZ1jUysnj451urbcf6Oedo9mHM6pA=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113034185/562421962/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.ee062520-4075-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.ee062520-4075-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVlMDYyNTIwLTQwNzUtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FZ7XE3wOUwHZlwMZ1jUysnj451urbcf6Oedo9mHM6pA=)

clean_body: He fired climate scientists and scrubbed government websites. Here's why. | | Donald Trump is launching a full-scale attack on climate science. FIRST: Trump fired nearly 400 scientists and experts working on the National Climate Assessment — our nation’s most comprehensive and trusted source for climate data. THEN: His administration quietly pulled down government websites that hosted these reports, hiding taxpayer-funded data that communities rely on to understand the climate crisis, prepare for its impacts, and fight back with real solutions. NOW: Trump's Energy Secretary says they're planning to rewrite previously published climate reports because they claim the science wasn't "fair". This isn’t about fairness. It’s about power and profit. Trump is rewriting science to protect the fossil fuel lobby that helped put him in office — no matter the cost to our planet. That’s why the work we’re doing at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC is more urgent than ever. We're backing candidates who are leading on climate now — in statehouses, city halls, school boards, and beyond — even as the federal government fails to act. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s do this. – Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Snake Eyes Sunglasses
subject: These Sunglasses Shouldn't be Legal!...
body:
Most civilians don't know this - and I’m shocked the mass media hasn’t picked up on this yet...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21766/6374453/e23221d62c6d3e5225428599fae6771571d5b765/2d1fe4bc5e908cd27ba56cf47200c5b270f3fb6b)

| | Hey Reader, Most civilians don't know this - and I’m shocked the mass media hasn’t picked up on this yet. But a group of American engineers have created **[the first unbreakab](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21766/6374453/3e6743aba32e70a8796145107cea2a4879df5ddb/2d1fe4bc5e908cd27ba56cf47200c5b270f3fb6b)[le tactical glasses](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21766/6374453/3e6743aba32e70a8796145107cea2a4879df5ddb/2d1fe4bc5e908cd27ba56cf47200c5b270f3fb6b)** that meet MIL SPEC ballistics standards for combat use... It’s all thanks to a groundbreaking new methods of using proven technology to create extreme durability and protection in even combat conditions. Now available to civilians for the first time. **[==> THESE are unbelievable](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21766/6374453/3e6743aba32e70a8796145107cea2a4879df5ddb/2d1fe4bc5e908cd27ba56cf47200c5b270f3fb6b)** **Thank You.** **P.S.** Right now, I'm throwing in 4 sets of lenses, a hard case, and FREE S&H!

If we flip the Governorship and expand our majority in the House of Delegates — and do it with _record-shattering turnout_ — Virginia will send Trump and Congressional Republicans a message they can’t ignore.

But frankly, Derek, we can’t stop there.

My point is, we’ve got to fight like hell to keep Virginia blue and flip the Senate, and the country is watching to see if we’ve got what it takes.

subject: NYT: White House Pushes Texas to Redistrict, Hoping to Blunt Democratic Gains

body:
Don't mess with Texas
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9911c750-6fa1-40d1-bf06-111946925f6a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Y’all, as if all the destruction Donald Trump has caused nationally isn’t enough, now he’s messing with Texas. The latest reports just revealed that he’s pressuring Texas Republicans to gerrymander new congressional districts that could DESTROY all the progress Democrats have made here over the past few years: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3a8a7662-bdf3-419e-822a-3fbf278a41ac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) NOT on my watch. I’ll fight to protect my home state from Trump’s schemes if it’s the last thing I do. But this ultimately isn’t just about Texas. This is about our democracy. Republicans know they can’t win an election without lying and cheating. So ahead of the 2026 midterm elections, they’re trying to rig the game in their favor by gerrymandering their way into another term in the majority. [I REFUSE to let that happen, but I need your help to fight back and stop them before it’s too late. Please, help me protect Texas and our democracy from these anti-democratic schemes before it’s too late by chipping in any amount right away. >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td4ee68ce-9fdf-4ced-b9a4-ecd2b8cec1c3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. name: David Hogg
subject: Young voters are paying attention

body:
The disconnect between messaging and action is getting harder to ignore.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250809-1&t=1&akid=2498%2E587540%2ENUYfD7)
Peter,
**There’s a growing disconnect between what political leaders say and what they actually do.**
Primaries are dismissed as distractions.
Young organizers are told to wait their turn.
And calls for accountability are framed as threats to unity.
At the same time, concern about losing young voters is at an all-time high. But when it comes to addressing the issues that matter most to young Americans — climate, debt, Gaza, housing, safety, and justice — the response is often silence or resistance.
It is not that young people are checked out. It is that they are _paying attention._
If Democrats want to win back young voters, they have to actually listen to us.
Because right now, it seems like they want young sycophants, not young voters they have to answer to.
They want young people who are ready to fall in line with the status quo, rather than push for a bolder vision and a better future for all of us.
**There is nothing radical about wanting representation that reflects real life. There is nothing divisive about challenging systems that shut people out. The status quo is not just uninspiring. It is not working.**
Leaders We Deserve exists to shift what is possible. This is not just about electing young candidates. It is about building campaigns that are rooted in values, community, and urgency.
Right now, our team is working to support candidates who are stepping up despite enormous barriers. Many are running in tough districts or against entrenched incumbents. They are organizing because their communities need real leadership — and because they are tired of being told to wait.
**This work takes time, resources, and belief. Every donation helps us recruit, train, and support the next generation of leaders who are ready to fight for something better.**
**[Can you make a contribution of $5 to power this work?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250809_1_change?refcode=em20250809-2498&amount=5&refcode2=2498_587540_NUYfD7&akid=2498%2E587540%2ENUYfD7)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250809_1_change?amount=5&refcode=em20250809-2498&refcode2=2498_587540_NUYfD7&akid=2498%2E587540%2ENUYfD7)**
Thank you for being part of this movement. The next generation is not asking for permission. They are stepping forward and we are here to back them.
In solidarity,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250809-1&t=2&refcode2=2498_587540_NUYfD7&akid=2498%2E587540%2ENUYfD7)**

subject: Intimidation tactics
body:
| | | |
Peter,
On Sunday, August 3rd, Texas Democrats broke quorum and left the state to block Trump's power grab as he tries to steal five Congressional seats in order to hold the majority in the U.S. House.
This wasn't easy. They left their families, homes, and careers behind to protect the people they represent from having their voices silenced.
Now, not only is Greg Abbott threatening the Democrats who walked out with fines, arrest, and even removal from office, but Attorney General Ken Paxton has launched an investigation into Powered by People for standing with Texas Democrats.
Rather than listening to the people, the Governor and the impeached Attorney General are trying to intimidate us into silence.
Turns out they don't like it when you fight back!
So let's take this fight to them. With as much as we got, for as long as it takes. The future of our country hangs in the balance.

With tumbleweeds rolling through Capitol Hill this August, it’s clear that some of the most egregious assaults on our democracy and some of the most powerful acts of resistance are happening in our own backyards.
What happens in our state legislature shapes the future of our country – it’s not a trickle-down effect; progress begins in our statehouses. The best and worst of policy starts in the states.

Texas Democrats are not backing down in the face of authoritarianism, even as Trump’s FBI is weaponized and Republicans are threatening to make arrests. Thank you, - Pat Harrigan Sent from my iPhone | Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee PO Box 97275, Raleigh, NC 27624 Copyright (C) 2025 Pat Harrigan for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: This season is for fighters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

This season is for fighters.

I’ve been on the road—from Oklahoma City to Omaha, Indianapolis to Kansas
City—meeting people who are stepping up, showing up, and organizing in the
face of some of the worst attacks we’ve seen yet from Republican
leadership in Texas.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250809-1.DlLQGZ&refcode=ema20250809-240302&t=1002&akid=240302%2E444211%2EbF8Ls2 ]Oklahoma City Town HallOklahoma City Town Hall

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250809-1.DlLQGZ&refcode=ema20250809-240302&t=1003&akid=240302%2E444211%2EbF8Ls2 ]Omaha Town HallOmaha Town Hall

We’re not going to let the moment pass without a fight. People are
organizing right now—because that’s what this moment demands.

The 2026 elections—and control of Congress—will be decided by the work we
do in 2025.

Right now courageous Texas House Democrats are stopping a GOP
redistricting scheme that would steal five congressional seats. They’re
risking arrest, fines, and removal from office by Greg Abbott and Ken
Paxton.

But they’re holding the line. Because they know that this fight isn’t just
about Texas. It’s about saving this country before it’s too late. We have
to have their backs in what is becoming the underdog fight of the century.

We’re laying the groundwork to take back power—from stopping this
Republican steal, to flipping congressional seats, to organizing in every
community. But we can’t do it without you.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250809-1.DlLQGZ&refcode=ema20250809-240302&t=1004&akid=240302%2E444211%2EbF8Ls2 ]Can you chip in $3 today to keep fueling this fight and
meet this moment?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250809-1.DlLQGZ&refcode=ema20250809-240302&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=240302%2E444211%2EbF8Ls2 ]DONATE $3

Thank you for standing with us,

Beto O’Rourke

name: John Fetterman
subject: Trump's guy just said the quiet part out loud (Social Security)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Hi, Derek,

Well, there it is. 😡 Trump's Treasury guy just let it slip that they're cooking up a new way to privatize Social Security.

The GOP’s been at this for nearly 90 years. Can’t say they're killing Social Security outright – too many folks have paid into it. So they lie. Say it’s going broke. Say Wall Street can do better. Bull.

Here’s what “privatize” really means:

👉 Hand your money to big banks and hedge funds

👉 Gamble your retirement in the market

👉 Gut the system so they can sell it for scrap

That ain't fixing Social Security. That’s stealing it.

Want a real fix? Easy. Shore it up. Lift the payroll cap. Tax rich folks’ stock profits. Done.

But Trump and the GOP? They don’t want to fix Social Security. They want to break it. Confuse you. Scare you. Then hand your future to Wall Street.

They’re already laying the trap. Cut staff ✅ Close offices ✅ Delay your check ✅ Then call you the fraud when you complain. It’s all part of the plan.

Not on my watch. You paid in. You earned it. It’s yours. Not theirs.

I’ll never stop fighting to protect Social Security. But I need to know you've got my back.

🙏 Please, will you take my 60-second Social Security survey now and tell me what you think?

http://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51523?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=1001&akid=10244%2E434096%2EXGdn_i

Thanks, yinz,

John ❤️

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1002&akid=10244%2E434096%2EXGdn_i

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

subject: Bernie is Back – Let’s Fuel the Fight Against Oligarchy!

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25192?t=1011&refcode=email-20250809_v&akid=9152%2E5885482%2E9FtHo- ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Bernie Sanders is about to take the stage again on his Fighting Oligarchy
tour – this time in West Virginia and North Carolina.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25221?source=email-20250809&t=1061&akid=9152%2E5885482%2E9FtHo- ]Bernie tweet annoucing he will be in West Virginia and North Carolina
this weekend

Bernie is igniting the grassroots to take on the oligarchs – and win back
power across the country. From battling the worst of Trump's regime to
electing a wave of powerful progressives like Zohran Mamdani in NYC,
Bernie needs us in this fight now.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25192?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250809nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9152%2E5885482%2E9FtHo- ]We are proud to do this work — organizing pressure campaigns on Capitol
Hill and mobilizing voters in the streets. But none of this is possible
without the people-powered support of Our Revolution members like you. Can
you chip in $5, $27, or whatever you can afford right now to fuel Our
Revolution’s grassroots Citizen Action Team to stand with Bernie as he
steps on stage?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

The stakes could not be higher. As August hits, grassroots energy is
flagging nationwide. News cycles brim with gloom: Trump is slashing
Medicaid and SNAP, trying to steal the midterms with redistricting, and
handing the keys to our country to a group of oligarchs who care only
about their own profits.

Bernie isn’t going to let that stop him – and neither are we. This is when
our fight is needed most.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25221?source=email-20250809&t=1060&akid=9152%2E5885482%2E9FtHo- ]Headline: Sanders's 'Fighting Oligarchy' tour heads to West Virginia,
North Carolina

Because here’s the brutal truth: right now, hard-working families are
struggling more than ever and the rights and dignity of so many are under
attack. We refuse to sit back as Trump continues to force through his MAGA
agenda.

That’s why we need to be out there in communities across the country,
talking to voters and making sure the working class understands what Trump
really stands for. Your donation right now will help us:

* Deploy trained organizers to bring our voices directly into
congressional offices
* Elect progressive, working-class champions who are committed to the
fight
* Fund hard-hitting actions to call out Trump’s billionaire cronies by
name
* Mobilize the grassroots to stop the worst of Trump’s agenda

Bernie brings his megaphone and his rallying cry. And Our Revolution’s
infrastructure and organizing machine can help turn that spark into
wildfire – organizing, training, and turning outrage into real change.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25192?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250809nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9152%2E5885482%2E9FtHo- ]Before Bernie steps on stage, will you rush your contribution and show
Trump’s billionaire class the strength of our movement?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113037041/562432377/1302243248?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250809_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODAxNGVjMy00OTc1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ybdgYsZbUYTCTrRgCYiZRQTiglwPyvOFWSVAFsrEbyA=) Peter—The Trump administration is rolling back yet another regulation that puts climate polluters over the health and safety of everyday people. Trump’s right-wing agenda to put billionaires over a safe and clean environment began on day one when he pulled the U.S. out of the Paris Climate Agreement and doubled down on our reliance on non-renewable resources. Before I got into public service, I spent my career working on the team that helped to deliver that very agreement—I know all too well that the climate crisis is at our door. **[We need leaders who believe in science and know that we can reverse course on the climate crisis, but it’ll take intentional policy to get there. clean_body: | = Peter—The Trump administration is rolling back yet another regulation that puts climate polluters over the health and safety of everyday people. Trump’s right-wing agenda to put billionaires over a safe and clean environment began on day one when he pulled the U.S. out of the Paris Climate Agreement and doubled down on our reliance on non-renewable resources. Before I got into public service, I spent my career working on the team that helped to deliver that very agreement—I know all too well that the climate crisis is at our door. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = The climate crisis impacts every aspect of our lives, from public health to energy bills to national security. The handouts to big polluters mean handing our future over to billionaires who are willing to accelerate us towards our next climate catastrophe for their payday. I won’t stop until we have leaders who put people over polluters. Thanks for your support, Yassamin Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

body:
The work we do in the next few months will determine whether democracy survives for years and decades to come.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113037699/562434655/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgwYTM0N2IwLTRhNzUtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3TmELNroHLgm9owvyC-3MJaALtLywtg5w9UDvxK9Ung=&emci=a75f4aa4-9b74-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=80a347b0-4a75-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)
---

Hi Peter, Some days, the attacks on democracy coming out of this White House can feel never-ending. From intimidating media organizations to attempts to undermine the census to the outrageous effort to redraw Texas’s congressional map — the assaults on our democracy are head-spinning. But here’s the thing: The work to save our democracy doesn’t mean exhausting ourselves with every fight Trump picks. It means staying focused on crucial redistricting fights, investing in key state-level elections, and monitoring impactful court decisions. This is the work that — and we’re not exaggerating when we say this — **will help determine whether our democracy emerges from the next four years intact or in tatters. ** [**The NDRC is relentlessly focused on defending our democracy and fair electoral maps across the country. These fights are happening now, and we need your help to fight back against the Trump administration’s most egregious attacks.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113037700/562434656/1256196342?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_DefendingDemocracyNOR_email_20250809-NDRC-Tier1-DefendingDemocracyNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250809-NDRC-Tier1-DefendingDemocracyNOR_&utm_campaign=DefendingDemocracyNOR&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgwYTM0N2IwLTRhNzUtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3TmELNroHLgm9owvyC-3MJaALtLywtg5w9UDvxK9Ung=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

It should be something both parties can agree on: electoral maps should be drawn fairly so that every voter has a voice in our democracy. As Attorney General Eric Holder likes to say, voters should choose their representatives — _not the other way around_.
Just a couple of weeks ago, Trump told reporters that in Texas, he wants a “simple redrawing, we pick up five seats.” Keep in mind that Texas’s maps are already being challenged by voters in court for violating the Voting Rights Act by diluting the voting power of people of color. Texas Republicans just unveiled a map that would do exactly that. They’re eager to do Trump’s bidding, even if it requires cheating — all to stockpile power and advance his extremist agenda.
**Fights like this are exactly why the NDRC exists — to stop politicians from wielding electoral maps as partisan political weapons**. Anti-democracy extremists will always try to wrest power away from voters — it’s on people like us to stop them.
[**The days ahead are absolutely critical — make a contribution TODAY and power our offensive and defensive strategy as we work to defend democracy in Texas and all across the country.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113037707/562434663/1256196342?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_DefendingDemocracyNOR_email_20250809-NDRC-Tier1-DefendingDemocracyNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250809-NDRC-Tier1-DefendingDemocracyNOR_&utm_campaign=DefendingDemocracyNOR&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgwYTM0N2IwLTRhNzUtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3TmELNroHLgm9owvyC-3MJaALtLywtg5w9UDvxK9Ung=)

clean_body: The work we do in the next few months will determine whether democracy survives for years and decades to come. | Hi Peter, Some days, the attacks on democracy coming out of this White House can feel never-ending. From intimidating media organizations to attempts to undermine the census to the outrageous effort to redraw Texas’s congressional map — the assaults on our democracy are head-spinning. But here’s the thing: The work to save our democracy doesn’t mean exhausting ourselves with every fight Trump picks. It means staying focused on crucial redistricting fights, investing in key state-level elections, and monitoring impactful court decisions. This is the work that — and we’re not exaggerating when we say this — will help determine whether our democracy emerges from the next four years intact or in tatters. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = It should be something both parties can agree on: electoral maps should be drawn fairly so that every voter has a voice in our democracy. As Attorney General Eric Holder likes to say, voters should choose their representatives — not the other way around. Just a couple of weeks ago, Trump told reporters that in Texas, he wants a “simple redrawing, we pick up five seats.” Keep in mind that Texas’s maps are already being challenged by voters in court for violating the Voting Rights Act by diluting the voting power of people of color. Texas Republicans just unveiled a map that would do exactly that. They’re eager to do Trump’s bidding, even if it requires cheating — all to stockpile power and advance his extremist agenda. Fights like this are exactly why the NDRC exists — to stop politicians from wielding electoral maps as partisan political weapons. Anti-democracy extremists will always try to wrest power away from voters — it’s on people like us to stop them. = Thanks for being part of this fight! — Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/21763/6374453/3f1012727c90c286545639e1ac44fb6612bf71b0/e8b60b775925bfc37be1012f01061b5808d23b42). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/21763/6374453/3f1012727c90c286545639e1ac44fb6612bf71b0/e8b60b775925bfc37be1012f01061b5808d23b42).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/21763/6374453/3f1012727c90c286545639e1ac44fb6612bf71b0/e8b60b775925bfc37be1012f01061b5808d23b42)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!

subject: When the Fake News tells us we should be “ashamed” of America, I take it personally.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
I swore I’d never let their sacrifice be erased. Stand with me >>

| | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aXuJ/?__vbtrk=MzEwMDU3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEwMDU3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
JD VANCE: When I served in the Marine Corps, I learned the hard way what that flag represented: an ultimate love and sacrifice for this country. I swore that I would never let their sacrifice be forgotten. So when Radical Leftists and illegal immigrants burn our flag in our streets, I take that personally. But this fight isn’t about me alone. It’s about whether America will bow to those who hate our country or whether we stand together and defend it. That’s why I need you standing with me right now. **[PLEASE, add your name to stand with me arm-in-arm to defend our flag against the Radical Left wackos.>>](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aXuJ/?__vbtrk=MzEwMDU3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEwMDU3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)****[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aXuK/?__vbtrk=MzEwMDU3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEwMDU3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)** [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aXuJ/?__vbtrk=MzEwMDU3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEwMDU3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct) God bless you,

subject: The stakes are crystal clear

body:

name: Andrea Salinas HQ
subject: Trump just fired the messenger
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
the Bureau of Labor Statistics’ newest jobs report is in — and the numbers aren’t looking great:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113038442/562437888/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWU2NTQyZS00ZTc1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A0XMARwC9mEb2b2rE8u5OYVnifEddUnG4k5fCm6Opwg=) Team, the Bureau of Labor Statistics’ newest jobs report is in — _and the numbers aren’t looking great:_ **_NBC: The U.S. job market was weak in July, and previous months were worse than thought_** **Unemployment?** Up. **Inflation?** Up. **Jobs?** _BLS revised growth for May and June down by over 258,000 THOUSAND job openings._ Trump’s response? **Shoot the messenger — _and fire the head commissioner of BLS._** It’s become abundantly clear: **Donald Trump’s erratic policies are wreaking havoc on the economy, and if left unchecked, Oregon’s farmers, small business owners, and working families will continue to suffer the consequences.** The White House is in desperate need of Congressional oversight to reign in Trump’s worst instincts. **But if House Republicans refuse to do their jobs and check the President’s power — _Democrats will._** But if Democrats are going to have any chance of flipping the House to provide a real check on the President’s trade authority, _that starts with holding must-win districts like OR-06._ **[So if you’re with us, please chip in $10 or whatever you can to help defend OR-06 and flip the House BLUE in 2026. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113038443/562437889/-480163815?refcode=email_080925_bls&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWU2NTQyZS00ZTc1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A0XMARwC9mEb2b2rE8u5OYVnifEddUnG4k5fCm6Opwg=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113038444/562437890/-480163815?express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&refcode=email_080925_bls&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWU2NTQyZS00ZTc1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A0XMARwC9mEb2b2rE8u5OYVnifEddUnG4k5fCm6Opwg=)

name: House DFL
subject: Team, are you feeling parched?
disclaimer_text: paid for by the
body:
Did you see this incredible news, Team?!
https://mn.gov/deed/paidleave/employees/leave-time/ [https://mn.gov/deed/paidleave/employees/leave-time/]
That’s right — Minnesota is committed to making it easier, safer, and more affordable to have kids here! And , I have great news: It’s about to get even more affordable.
The state is getting ready to launch Minnesota’s brand-new Paid Leave program in January 2026. Now, you can now find out how much your paychecks could be if you need to take leave: [https://mn.gov/deed/paidleave/employees/leave-time/]
CALCULATE YOUR PAYCHECK HERE [https://mn.gov/deed/paidleave/employees/leave-time/]
Some important things to keep in mind:
* If you have a baby in 2025 or 2026, you’ll qualify for some leave.
* If you need to care for a sick family member or recover from an illness or surgery yourself, you’ll be eligible!
* You can take leave all at once in a single block.
* You can take leave on a regular schedule — for example, the same day each week for medical treatments for yourself or a family member.
* You can take leave only when you need it. For example, to manage flare-ups of a chronic health condition.
* You can take leave at different times in a year, for the same condition or more than one condition.
Learn more about the new program and calculate what you qualify for here:
CALCULATE YOUR PAYCHECK HERE [https://mn.gov/deed/paidleave/employees/leave-time/]
Athena Hollins
Mom of 2 Great Kids, House DFL Whip
District 66B Representative
P.S. In 2023, House DFLers led the charge to bring this paid leave program to Minnesota. Paid Leave will protect jobs and lower costs for millions of Minnesota families.
In 2025, the Minnesota GOP tried multiple times to cancel and delay Paid Leave, threatening to leave Minnesota families high and dry.
House DFLers stood up for Minnesota families and blocked every GOP effort to repeal or delay Paid Leave in our state. We’ll never stop fighting for you and your family.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-aug25?refcode=080625_ENG_PaidLeave_AH [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-aug25?refcode=080625_ENG_PaidLeave_AH]
We are prohibited from accepting contributions from PACs and lobbyists during the legislative session.
Give $75 and Get $75 back from Minnesota! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-aug25?refcode=080625_ENG_PaidLeave_AH]
The Political Contribution Refund is a Minnesota program that lets you donate $75 (or $150 per couple) once per year and have it refunded by the state. It’s a fantastic way to support the work of the House DFL. Can we count on you to make your refundable donation today?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $75 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-aug25?refcode=080625_ENG_PaidLeave_AH_75&amount=75&express_lane=true]
DONATE $150 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-aug25?refcode=080625_ENG_PaidLeave_AH_150&amount=150&express_lane=true]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-aug25?refcode=080625_ENG_PaidLeave_AH&recurring=true]

Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor.

If my name and face are familiar, it's not just because I ran for Congress in 2024.
For more than 30 years, I was a TV news anchor, uplifting the stories of Central Pennsylvanians. I flew over New York City with the Pennsylvania National Guard after 9/11, delivered the heartbreaking news that _Roe v. Wade_ had been overturned on live television, and shared the stories of businesses closing, job losses, and families struggling to put food on the table and keep a roof over their heads.
**I am a dedicated truth teller with decades of experience standing up for our neighbors.**
Now I am working to replace former Freedom Caucus Chair and _**MAGA insurrectionist Scott Perry. **_
❌ He has praised the GOP budget bill that just passed. You know — the one that will kick millions of hard-working Americans off Medicaid, shutter rural hospitals, and give tax cuts to the wealthy 1%.
❌ He has supported a national abortion ban with no exceptions.
❌ He helped plan the January 6th insurrection, where Americans lost their lives.
Scott Perry is too extreme for PA-10, and we deserve better.

clean_body: Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Hi there, Peter. I'm Janelle Stelson, the Democrat running to oust Scott Perry in PA-10 — a major tossup district. In 2024, this was the second closest race in the entire country — we lost by just 5,133 votes. We can flip this district from red to blue this time, but it is going to take every single one of us. = | | = If my name and face are familiar, it's not just because I ran for Congress in 2024. For more than 30 years, I was a TV news anchor, uplifting the stories of Central Pennsylvanians. I flew over New York City with the Pennsylvania National Guard after 9/11, delivered the heartbreaking news that Roe v. Wade had been overturned on live television, and shared the stories of businesses closing, job losses, and families struggling to put food on the table and keep a roof over their heads. I am a dedicated truth teller with decades of experience standing up for our neighbors. Now I am working to replace former Freedom Caucus Chair and MAGA insurrectionist Scott Perry. ❌ He has praised the GOP budget bill that just passed. You know — the one that will kick millions of hard-working Americans off Medicaid, shutter rural hospitals, and give tax cuts to the wealthy 1%. ❌ He has supported a national abortion ban with no exceptions. ❌ He helped plan the January 6th insurrection, where Americans lost their lives. Scott Perry is too extreme for PA-10, and we deserve better. Peter: PA-10 is a make-or-break district to flip the U.S. House. We have a serious shot at winning this district, but my opponent is backed by mountains of dark money and billionaire donors. The support of grassroots donors like you is crucial to our success. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Help us oust Scott Perry once and for all. With gratitude, Janelle * | | | ---|---|--- | get involved to support austin davis for PA Lieutenant Governor While serving as Lieutenant Governor, Austin Davis helped advance some of the most progressive changes the Commonwealth has seen in decades. Now, he's helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot.
