name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” just screwed us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| Hey friend, Last month, House Republicans rammed through what Donald Trump is proudly calling the “One Big Beautiful Bill.” Let's be honest: it's one big toxic mess. **The truth? This bill is nothing but a greedy handout to billionaires and a slap in the face to the rest of us. While Trump and his MAGA inner circle pop champagne, working families get stuck with higher prices, fewer services, and an even more rigged system.** How This Bill Hurts America:
* **You pay at the register:** Tariffs work like a tax that gets passed straight to consumers. Need groceries, home repairs, or new clothes? You’re paying more now.
* **Inflation is surging:** Data just out shows inflation picking up steam, with the rising costs directly fueled by these new Trump tariffs.
* **American jobs at risk:** European officials warn that these tariffs could effectively shut down transatlantic trade, threatening millions of jobs on both sides. Experts say supply chains and small businesses are on the chopping block.
* **No real plan—just pain:** Instead of a strategy to help American workers, Trump is sticking families and businesses with the bill, all while destabilizing the economy.

Trump calls that “beautiful.” I call it exactly what it is: reckless, cruel, and dangerously out of touch. **I fought this bill at every single step—because someone has to stand up for families while Trump plays pretend populist. But now that it’s law, the fight shifts: we need to stay loud, expose every piece of the fallout, and protect those getting steamrolled.** **Here’s the deal: Seth Moulton and I can’t do that on my own. [If you’re as angry about this as we are and ready to hold these guys accountable, chip in now to help us keep the pressure on:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113042405/562451543/265156787?refcode=2507809_MFC_Swalwell_BBB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzQyYzUyMi02Mzc1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OeXnz_b1fGdKKeSQfqThOwV4TLUeemgyUp4GoMp9oi4=)** Thanks for not sitting this one out—and for staying in the fight when it counts. Onward, Eric & Seth [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113042406/562451544/-288956247?refcode=2507809_MFC_Swalwell_BBB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzQyYzUyMi02Mzc1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OeXnz_b1fGdKKeSQfqThOwV4TLUeemgyUp4GoMp9oi4=)

name: Team VAP
subject: We must heed their warning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
WaPo - Opinion: A frantic warning from 100 leading experts: Our democracy is in grave danger [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=080925_1&amount=25]
We’ll keep this short, Team: those experts are right.
The attacks of the last few years in our state legislatures across the country targeting the right to vote, especially minority communities, are an assault on our democracy.
Now Trump, Musk, DOGE, and the MAGA movement want to privatize our postal service and harm mail-in voting , which has helped millions of Americans vote -- not just in the pandemic, but going back to the states that adopted the widespread practice in the early 90's.
“ Our entire democracy is now at risk ,” they wrote. “ History will judge what we do at this moment. ”
With so much at stake now -- not just with voting rights -- we've got to push our efforts to fight back into overdrive ASAP.
Team, none of this happens without everyone doing their share. Fuel our work with $25 or whatever you can today to stop the destruction of our government, save our democracy, and protect the right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=080925_1&amount=25]

subject: We shouldn’t still have to fight for this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
[PETITION] [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113042951/562453446/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmUzNzJhNy02NDc1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DzucbiBDgD8kegqZK8e_Wen5HAh5oninrGnwiMcCLfY=&emci=da7f7112-9174-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=76e372a7-6475-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=15820338)

Peter,

This week marks 60 years since the Voting Rights Act was signed into law. This legislation was a huge milestone in the fight for civil rights and equal access to the ballot box.

But here we are, six decades later, _still fighting tooth and nail to defend the right to vote._

Republicans have spent years chipping away at voting rights by passing restrictive laws, pushing discriminatory voter ID requirements, and doing everything they can to silence voters, especially in communities of color—**because they know that when more people vote, they lose.**

Now, the Trump-appointed Supreme Court is looking at a case that could take another big swing at the Voting Rights Act and weaken it even more. But Peter, Kim knows our democracy works best when everyone has a say, _that’s why she:_

**✅ Voted for the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act to restore and strengthen the VRA

✅ Supported the For the People Act to expand voting rights and make government more accountable

✅ Spoke out against harmful voter ID laws that suppress turnout, especially among minority voters**

name: Minnesota DFL
subject: What Minnesotans fear most about Trump's budget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Minnesota Democratic–Farmer–Labor Party
body:
We’ve compiled your feedback, and we want to share some of the key takeaways with you. | | | **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113043091/562453853/393297776?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzU5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTgyY2MxMS02Njc1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iDGpshJ7lId4jn9U1zUYY7Imr1z9PBkeQUFI9VfPVMM=)**
---
Peter, Thank you to everyone who responded to our Trump Budget Survey. We’ve compiled your feedback, and we want to share some of the key takeaways with you. **Which parts of Donald Trump’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” concern you most? ** _Your top concern was the tax breaks Trump and his allies gave to billionaires and large corporations. Respondents also expressed worries about the health care cuts that will impact over 250,000 Minnesotans, higher health care costs for middle-class families, and threats to rural and critical-access hospitals. _ **How will Trump’s budget impact you and your loved ones? ** _Many told us this bill would drive up costs and put more strain on their household budgets. Dozens of people shared personal stories of hardship, and lack of access to affordable health care was a recurring theme. Even respondents who felt they could weather the negative effects of Trump’s budget expressed concern for their loved ones and the most vulnerable members of their communities. _ **What strategies should the DFL prioritize as we fight back against Trump and his dangerous agenda? ** _Respondents said their top priority for us was countering misinformation and extremism online. You also want us to hold Trump and his MAGA allies accountable, mobilize voters across Minnesota, and fight for everyone impacted by this budget. _ We’re deeply grateful for your input, and we’re committed to acting on it. But we need your support to take the bold steps you’re calling for. According to our records, you’re still eligible for the Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program. That means you can give $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the state of Minnesota. [**Peter, you told us your top priorities. Will you help us put them into action by making a refundable $75 donation today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113043104/562453867/-790176424?refcode=body&amount=75&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzU5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTgyY2MxMS02Njc1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iDGpshJ7lId4jn9U1zUYY7Imr1z9PBkeQUFI9VfPVMM=) | | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: We’ve compiled your feedback, and we want to share some of the key takeaways with you. | | | = Peter, Thank you to everyone who responded to our Trump Budget Survey. We’ve compiled your feedback, and we want to share some of the key takeaways with you. Which parts of Donald Trump’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” concern you most? Your top concern was the tax breaks Trump and his allies gave to billionaires and large corporations. Respondents also expressed worries about the health care cuts that will impact over 250,000 Minnesotans, higher health care costs for middle-class families, and threats to rural and critical-access hospitals. How will Trump’s budget impact you and your loved ones? Many told us this bill would drive up costs and put more strain on their household budgets. Dozens of people shared personal stories of hardship, and lack of access to affordable health care was a recurring theme. Even respondents who felt they could weather the negative effects of Trump’s budget expressed concern for their loved ones and the most vulnerable members of their communities. What strategies should the DFL prioritize as we fight back against Trump and his dangerous agenda? Respondents said their top priority for us was countering misinformation and extremism online. You also want us to hold Trump and his MAGA allies accountable, mobilize voters across Minnesota, and fight for everyone impacted by this budget. We’re deeply grateful for your input, and we’re committed to acting on it. But we need your support to take the bold steps you’re calling for. According to our records, you’re still eligible for the Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program. That means you can give $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the state of Minnesota. = | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = Thank you, Minnesota DFL | = * = = Monthly supporters are the backbone of all we do. name: Mandela Barnes via The Long Run
subject: Thank you, Governor Evers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
As we look to the future, we have a responsibility to protect what we’ve built.
| You may be receiving this email because of your previous support for organizations like The Long Run PAC. We need your support, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from us, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5586%2E196590%2E0hyc4g). [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4347?t=2&akid=5586%2E196590%2E0hyc4g)
---
| The only thing that remains constant is change, and with Governor Evers announcing he won’t seek a third term, we’re entering a new chapter in Wisconsin.

Tony and I were running mates, but more than that, we were friends. In a world of fake interactions and political posturing, I can honestly say that never happened between us.

He led our state with integrity and compassion, always focused on doing right by the people of Wisconsin. Under his leadership, we expanded healthcare access, protected public education, brought real, meaningful investments to working people, and secured fair maps for our state.

Now, as we look to the future, we have a responsibility to protect what we’ve built, including the new legislative maps, and elect a leader who will keep moving Wisconsin forward with the same grit, heart, and steady hand that Governor Evers brought to the Governor’s Mansion.

**At Long Run PAC, it’ll be our mission to ensure that the next governor of Wisconsin shares that vision. We’re ready to organize, build power at the grassroots level, and support bold candidates who reflect the people of this state.[_If you want to support our efforts, I hope you’ll chip in a contribution of $25 or whatever you can spare today_ :](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4347?t=3&akid=5586%2E196590%2E0hyc4g)**

Let’s keep going.

Mandela Barnes
Founder, Long Run PAC

body:
| | | Friend, We’ve been gaining ground, and the Left knows it.That’s why they’re trying to **bury this campaign before it takes off for real**. Let me update you on the state of this race:
* The smears are intensifying.
* The dark money’s flowing.
* And national Democrats are doing everything they can to choke off our momentum before it becomes unstoppable.

_But I’ve seen this kind of pressure before. I didn’t fight for this country to back down now._
---
[ **BE MY CO-PILOT** ](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=cf20687449d2487583437dc415067eb4&_e=s9V4OWKTc7Ye-7rCOcmd7YmryQty8u4-OE-TgZbeWwbx_dI51cepAVx2fM3qnFaK_T-9R2qb-VHqPMVstIf9IWEztH-CzxwIXjTyFR1tRhMlWDgat9WN5VkSA1Y1DVt0TsfP-s2qABwa0xI1UrPwT7CDRbbEfIQ0EIiDfGejIhgSWPibPICArNrIJfRLGLUPvqZIHKUFI0O_P8neahwZLYZUDvXClUEADaZaDbtX7GI-LwGys_SVIUXblDtSUVD9UbTGJmXlq90qqz0Ib2XRR7YNQ5dRBYsWoXu9G16EwQ59G5CH4MY8G0bsM6W-87f8Ixyb-GBIyDzqyU86BJBh_j5vtN7nTuYi3XNhqiEn_zluXiHAIadg_xALp-DkqtMjSnCIJ7H3sZGrSm6jQNxLMmSyzYuP5ttxdVswj5DqZB73pGa4zG_pD2z5uZvt3M3d)

name: Team NDRC
subject: An unjust attempt to thwart the will of the people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
This moment requires all of us to pitch in whatever we can
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113043465/562455298/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyMjg3MjM3LTZjNzUtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MtJbQsx0sMHyeSaUdjHTttXglOvsrW0p5JJKR5xSpWE=&emci=e7f8407f-9c74-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=62287237-6c75-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, Republicans across the country are bending the knee to Trump and national Republican leadership and exploring mid-decade redistricting where they can manipulate the maps in their favor before next year’s elections. From tariffs to the passing of the Big Bad Bill, they know their party is extraordinarily unpopular, so they are doing everything they can to steal power from the people. Texas’s special legislative session is at a critical moment. Republicans proposed a new, even more gerrymandered map that could give Republicans five additional House seats. And several Democrats have left the state to prevent the legislature from reaching the quorum it needs to vote on this extreme map. The proposed map divides communities of color and packs Black and Latino voters into as few districts as possible, essentially reducing the number of districts in which they are able to elect a candidate of their choice. **Make no mistake: This is about grabbing power for Trump and Republicans by taking power _away_ from people of color. Plain and simple.** **The NDRC is on the front lines of the fight for fair maps and fair representation. Our team is in overdrive to do whatever it takes to defend our elections from this anti-democracy plot. clean_body: This moment requires all of us to pitch in whatever we can | Peter, Republicans across the country are bending the knee to Trump and national Republican leadership and exploring mid-decade redistricting where they can manipulate the maps in their favor before next year’s elections. From tariffs to the passing of the Big Bad Bill, they know their party is extraordinarily unpopular, so they are doing everything they can to steal power from the people. Texas’s special legislative session is at a critical moment. Republicans proposed a new, even more gerrymandered map that could give Republicans five additional House seats. And several Democrats have left the state to prevent the legislature from reaching the quorum it needs to vote on this extreme map. The proposed map divides communities of color and packs Black and Latino voters into as few districts as possible, essentially reducing the number of districts in which they are able to elect a candidate of their choice. Make no mistake: This is about grabbing power for Trump and Republicans by taking power away from people of color. Plain and simple. The NDRC is on the front lines of the fight for fair maps and fair representation. Our team is in overdrive to do whatever it takes to defend our elections from this anti-democracy plot. name: PA Dems
subject: This bill is a disaster, and they backed it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Peter,

By now, we have already established that Trump’s so-called _Big Bullsh*t Bill_ is nothing but a betrayal of Pennsylvania families, and nearly every Republican from our state voted for it.

They voted to **_cut $1.2 trillion from Medicaid and food assistance programs_**. That means healthcare stripped from seniors, meals taken from kids, and essential programs gutted, all while billionaires and big corporations get richer.

Here’s how they showed up:
* **Sen. Dave McCormick:** Voted for Trump’s bill, siding with cuts to Medicaid and food assistance programs while giving massive tax breaks to corporations and billionaires.
* **Rep. Rob Bresnahan (PA-08):** Told constituents he would never cut Medicaid or harm rural hospitals. Then he turned around and voted for exactly that.
* **Rep. Ryan Mackenzie (PA-07):** Supported deep cuts to programs families depend on while giving corporations a free pass.
* **Rep. Daniel Meuser (PA-09):** Backed Trump’s plan to shift the burden onto Pennsylvania taxpayers and working families.
* **Rep. Scott Perry (PA-10):** Voted to gut essential services while championing tax giveaways to the wealthy.
* **Rep. Lloyd Smucker (PA-11):** Put his vote toward policies that hurt children and seniors in Lancaster and beyond.
* **Rep. John Joyce (PA-13):** Supported huge cuts to Medicaid despite rural Pennsylvania’s reliance on these programs.
* **Rep. Guy Reschenthaler (PA-14):** Stood with corporate lobbyists and billionaires instead of the people he represents.
* **Rep. Glenn Thompson (PA-15):** Cast his vote for cuts that will devastate families, while defending the bill as “reform.”
* **Rep. Mike Kelly (PA-16):** Voted for policies that take food off the tables of families in Erie and Butler while padding corporate profits.

**_These lawmakers made a choice. They chose billionaires over working families. They chose corporate donors over kids and seniors. They chose politics over people._**

We are building the infrastructure to hold them accountable, but we need your help to do it. Every dollar raised today goes directly into the fight to take these seats back and protect programs that Pennsylvania families rely on.

clean_body: | | Peter, By now, we have already established that Trump’s so-called Big Bullsht Bill is nothing but a betrayal of Pennsylvania families, and nearly every Republican from our state voted for it. They voted to cut $1.2 trillion from Medicaid and food assistance programs. That means healthcare stripped from seniors, meals taken from kids, and essential programs gutted, all while billionaires and big corporations get richer. Here’s how they showed up: Sen. Dave McCormick: Voted for Trump’s bill, siding with cuts to Medicaid and food assistance programs while giving massive tax breaks to corporations and billionaires. Rep. Rob Bresnahan (PA-08): Told constituents he would never cut Medicaid or harm rural hospitals. Then he turned around and voted for exactly that. Rep. Ryan Mackenzie (PA-07): Supported deep cuts to programs families depend on while giving corporations a free pass. Rep. Daniel Meuser (PA-09): Backed Trump’s plan to shift the burden onto Pennsylvania taxpayers and working families. Rep. Scott Perry (PA-10): Voted to gut essential services while championing tax giveaways to the wealthy. Rep. Lloyd Smucker (PA-11): Put his vote toward policies that hurt children and seniors in Lancaster and beyond. Rep. John Joyce (PA-13): Supported huge cuts to Medicaid despite rural Pennsylvania’s reliance on these programs. Rep. Guy Reschenthaler (PA-14): Stood with corporate lobbyists and billionaires instead of the people he represents. Rep. Glenn Thompson (PA-15): Cast his vote for cuts that will devastate families, while defending the bill as “reform.” Rep. Mike Kelly (PA-16): Voted for policies that take food off the tables of families in Erie and Butler while padding corporate profits. These lawmakers made a choice. They chose billionaires over working families. They chose corporate donors over kids and seniors. They chose politics over people. We are building the infrastructure to hold them accountable, but we need your help to do it. Every dollar raised today goes directly into the fight to take these seats back and protect programs that Pennsylvania families rely on. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = We’re not going to let this vote be forgotten. Not now. Not ever. — PA Dems = | Follow us on , , and ! Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party. name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Did YOU Know There Is More Than 1 Book Of God And There Are 2 Resurrections From The Dead?
body:
Did YOU know there actually 2 Resurrections from the dead and 2 Judgements at the end as well as more than 1 Book of God? Join me tomorrow at Sherida
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23747007.12343.1.620a6ab3256f4caa34370b6ab6e6b057) |
---
Did YOU know there actually **2 Resurrections from the dead** and **2 Judgements at the end** as well as **more than 1 Book of God**? Join me tomorrow at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23747007.12344.1.e4a0a6c79a85a190f7bb3c0a97f36bef) for **The Book Of Acts Pt. 75 - 2 Resurrections. 2 Judgements. 2 Destinations.** **Tulsa** | 10am CT **OKC** | 6pm CT **Online** : [https://www.youtube.com/@sheridanchurch ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23747007.12345.1.ade5ad9334abf6c1b869b101d531c03d) Also, please consider giving towards the mission of [Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23747007.12346.1.456df2f96a31fab7a0ffd399e34cc1fd) by visiting: [https://sheridan.church/give/](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23747007.12347.1.4c0e3cf3804e07bb001f747fd746e228) or mailing a check to 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK 74145 Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23747007.12348.1.069c4b6a9a2a1f460e600e810f584bba)
---
---
|
---
This September is **IGNITE 2025** at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23747007.12349.1.cccd38a4b23e21f02ee7236890453519)! **IGNITE Service Schedule:** -Wednesday, September 3 @7pm CT: **Jackson Lahmeyer** -Sunday, September 7 @10am + 6pm CT: **Perry Stone** -Sunday, September 14 @10am CT: **Darryl Strawberry** -Sunday, September 21 @10am CT: **Dr. Randy Caldwell** -Sunday, September 28 @10am CT: **Bishop Darrell Hines** September will be an _INCREDIBLE_ month at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23747007.12350.1.b903484693bdec4dccc8f6999c13d03e)!
---
---
|
---
My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23747007.12351.1.8304c46526f6807a65b243eb76793fe5) is out and has reached **#12 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth**! **I have been blown away by the response!** THANK YOU SO MUCH! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23747007.12352.1.7ba96e838ff2931fd2eaba2a6b1b94de)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23747007.12353.1.2a54e543af14f8801b2d5e3b695fa32e)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23747007.12354.1.7892e322e0687818c236bf72c4ef8d72). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23747007.12355.1.bb4982df2feff22999468708f860e480) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23747007.12356.1.b4655f9c194bcb175379b77ae5f30e8e) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23747007.12357.1.12f5058f61d2d798cc8eb1169d2415bd) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.

In I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced. | Get your here: Thank you, | | ©2025 Jackson Lahmeyer | 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK | == "Web Version" == "Preferences" == "Forward" "Unsubscribe" |

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: a ton of new data — here’s what you need to know
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-sherrill?refcode=250809em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-sherrill?refcode=250809em]
Too often, when campaigns face cold, hard data showing a tough road ahead, they turn a blind eye. It’s one of the reasons Democrats are where we are today.
I’m determined not to repeat the mistakes of the past. So I’m going to share with you the truth about what the data is showing about our race here in New Jersey. I’m also going to share my plan for how we can overcome the obstacles and win. And then, if you’re all in on beating Jack Ciattarelli and preventing New Jersey from falling into the hands of a MAGA loyalist, I’m going to ask you to split what you can between my team and Oregon Secretary of State Tobias Read to help me put that plan into action. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-sherrill?refcode=250809em]
Here’s an unvarnished look at what the data tells us:
→Polling. Since the general election began a few weeks ago, one poll after another has come out showing me with a small lead (often just 3-6%) over Jack Ciattarelli, with more than enough undecided voters to swing the outcome either way.
And that’s not even taking into account the possibility that the polls could be underestimating Republicans, FIRSTNAME, as they have in several recent elections. We need to campaign like we’re behind — because we may well be.
→Recent elections. The 2024 presidential race in New Jersey was decided by less than 6% The last governor’s race here? Decided by just 3%. Recent election results and recent polls all tell the same story: New Jersey is a battleground state.
→Attack ads. Ciattarelli’s super PAC has announced plans to spend over a million dollars attacking me across New Jersey, with plenty more planned in the weeks ahead. One recent poll found that after undecided voters heard these false attacks without a fact-check, they swung heavily in Ciattarelli’s direction.
Here’s what this all means: we are in an incredibly competitive race, and we will only win it if we work night and day to get our message out all across New Jersey. And that’s exactly what my team and I plan to do.
We need to move beyond the usual Democratic comfort zone and show up everywhere so that voters can actually hear what we have to say.
We need to blanket the state with our plan for lowering costs and making daily life easier for New Jersey families.
We need to reach out personally to undecided voters — and make sure every single one of our supporters shows up to vote this fall.
And it won’t be enough to fight Ciattarelli and his dark-money machine to a draw. We need to outhustle, outwork, and outsmart them every step of the way.
I’m all in on winning this race for the people of New Jersey. I’ve spent my life running toward tough fights, and I won’t hesitate to run toward this one. If you’re with me, I need your support. Please split whatever you can between my campaign and Tobias Read to help us win what is shaping up to be a nail-biter of a race. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-sherrill?refcode=250809em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-sherrill?refcode=250809em]
Thank you,
Mikie Sherrill
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-sherrill?refcode=250809em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-sherrill?refcode=250809em]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-sherrill?refcode=250726em]
Tobias Read is Oregon's Secretary of State. To support him directly, please donate here. [https://www.tobiasread.com]
Mikie Sherrill is running for Governor of New Jersey. You can support her directly here. [https://www.mikiesherrill.com/]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States

subject: Bombshell Video Dropping Soon – We Need Your Help to Keep Exposing the Truth!
body:
We have a bombshell video releasing very soon that you absolutely won't want to miss. In it, we'll be exposing a State Department official knowingly jeopardizing U.S. national security.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e21254768/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvdnhqMzh2R2Iydw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDk/LbmNsOVJEU0tyag/qP2hpZHM9bmNCNzBJNzhudHg3WXJscw/gaJfLHg/sfmc4453512)

| | | | [****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Dear Patriot,

We’re on the verge of something huge at O'Keefe Media Group (OMG).

**We have a bombshell video releasing very soon** that you absolutely won't want to miss.

In it, we'll be exposing a State Department official knowingly jeopardizing U.S. national security by blatantly ignoring State Department policy designed to keep America safe.

We've reached out to the State Department for comment and are waiting to hear back – **stay tuned, because this one is going to send shockwaves.**

But [**I need your donation today to finish this investigation**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) and another massive one we have in the works.

We're deep into another massive story that's set to break soon, one that will **shake up Washington** like never before.

To finish these investigations and bring you the unfiltered truth, [**I need your support now more than ever.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

Here's the reality: Running OMG isn't easy or cheap.

**I have bills to pay, airfare to cover for our undercover operations, and film editors and researchers who need to be compensated for their incredible work.**

Our small staff is the heart and soul of what we do – a dedicated team of truth-seekers who work tirelessly, **seven days a week, at a breakneck pace** to uncover corruption and hold the powerful accountable.

These are everyday heroes: journalists, editors, and investigators who sacrifice family time, sleep, and personal lives to fight for transparency.

They've been with me through thick and thin, facing threats, legal battles, and endless obstacles. Without them, stories like this wouldn't see the light of day.

But right now, we're stretched thin, and [**your generosity is what keeps us going**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.).

**By[**supporting OMG**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.), you're not just donating – you're empowering a great staff to continue their vital mission and protect our nation's integrity.**

[**Will you stand with us today?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

Your contribution, no matter the size, will help us finalize these explosive stories and keep the pressure on. Please have our back by [**donating securely and make a real difference**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.).

Thank you so much for all that you do. I can’t do this work without you.

Together, me you and the amazing men and women working hard at OMG, we're exposing the truth and changing the world. [**Help us keep going today.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

In Truth,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: George Whitesides
subject: “summer break”
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q3-2025?refcode=em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q3-2025?refcode=em-header]
Peter,

The House is on “summer break”, but the fallout from the Trump Administration’s chaos only grows.

Back home in California’s 27th district, I’m hearing from a lot of folks who are deeply concerned about their healthcare, the future of their families, and how they’ll continue to put food on the table with rising costs.

Rather than work with Democrats, the national GOP forced the House’s summer recess early – leaving millions of Americans with more questions than answers.

We should be focused on lowering costs and creating an economy that works for everyone. Instead, this administration would rather spend millions on a White House ballroom and urge state Republicans to redraw their Congressional maps to keep the MAGA agenda in power for years to come.

That’s why today, I’m asking for your input: Will you take our August survey to let me know your thoughts about what matters most?

Take the survey >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/cOGIjHAtHUuDxXhhJYTbGg2?refcode=em-8.9.25-all-b

Thank you,

George

name: Brandon Herrera
subject: I'm back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Herrera for Congress
body:
Patriot,
Last time, we came within less than 1% of defeating an incumbent Republican who sold out the 2nd Amendment, the border, and my home state of Texas. That was despite being outspent 10 to 1 and smeared by the other side's lies.
I thought Tony Gonzales might have learned his lesson. Instead, the moment he was re-elected, he went on CNN to trash President Trump and undermine his agenda.
I could walk away, focus on my business, and enjoy the blessings I have been given. But I cannot stand by while he continues to betray us.
That is why I am running again, and this time we are going to win.
My favorite film is _Rocky II_. In the first movie, Rocky came out of nowhere with no backing, no experience, just passion and grit, and nearly took down the champ. In the rematch, wiser, sharper, and better prepared, he finished the job.
That is where I am now. I have been through the fight once, I know what it takes, and I am ready to go the distance. To prove it, I will personally match the first $100,000 donated this month, dollar for dollar, out of my own pocket.
Help me set an August fundraising record. Donate now at: [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/Help](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/IdkmGXo89tPNKZaMWDrhSg/j0TumwRADr2j763Wq7a17BPg).
Every donation this month counts toward our first giveaway. Set up a recurring gift and you will be entered for every giveaway going forward.
We came this close last time because you stood with me. Now I am asking you to stand with me again to defend our Constitution, our liberty, and our country.
Respectfully,

Brandon Herrera
P.S. Donate today and be automatically entered for our next giveaway: [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/Help](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/MxBVBoxAIcpHkBdJraW6rg/j0TumwRADr2j763Wq7a17BPg).

subject: The stakes couldn’t be higher on 8/26...
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
On August 26th, Iowa Democrats are competing in a crucial special election. The GOP-backed candidate in this race is Chris Prosch, a right-wing extremist with a disturbing track record. | | |
---
| |
---|---
On August 26th, Iowa Democrats are competing in a crucial special election. The GOP-backed candidate in this race is Chris Prosch, a right-wing extremist with a disturbing track record. **Chris Prosch’s horrifying resume includes:**
* Stating that victims of rape or incest should be forced to carry their pregnancies to term.
* Claiming without evidence that the 2020 election was stolen.
* Spreading conspiracy theories that 9/11 was a cover-up, vaccines are unsafe, and climate change is not real.
* Equating abortion access to the Holocaust.

A victory in Iowa would mean breaking the Republican supermajority in Iowa’s state Senate _and_ denying this right-wing weirdo a seat in government. We expect a tight race, likely to be decided by a handful of votes – grassroots contributions are critical for securing victories in races like this nationwide. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: They will do anything in order to fulfill Trump’s wishes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
The stakes in the fight for our democracy are rising fast. **John Cornyn announced that the FBI will be tracking down the Texas Democrats who left the state to block Trump’s power grab.**
This comes right after our corrupt, impeached, twice-indicted Attorney General, Ken Paxton, launched an investigation into Powered by People for the simple act of having the backs of these brave lawmakers.
They’re doing all this to try to intimidate us while they carry out Donald Trump’s plan to steal five Democratic seats in Congress in order to cling on to the House of Representatives.
Instead of trying to win more votes, they’re trying to rig the system to make sure they hold onto power no matter what.
That’s why Texas Democrats left the state to break quorum. It’s the most powerful tool they have to save our democracy.
We’re in this fight for as long as it takes to win. But we need people from across the country to join us if we’re going to win.
[**Can you join us in this fight by chipping in $3 or more to help Powered by People stand up to these attacks and keep fighting for democracy?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250809-2.qTJTvQ&refcode=ema20250809-240300&t=2&akid=240300%2E444211%2E-skXvQ)

name: CA Democrats
subject: Virtual Town Hall and Know Your Rights Training with Rep. Robert Garcia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
cadem.org [cadem.org]
This email is in English and Spanish
Democrats,
Donald Trump’s anti-immigrant agenda is creating fear among our communities. Families are being torn apart, community leaders are being targeted, and ICE arrests are happening at courthouses and workplaces across California.
We need to protect ourselves, protect each other, and organize to win.
Join Congressman Robert Garcia, Angelica Salas of CHIRLA, and special guests for a virtual Town Hall and Know Your Rights training on Thursday, August 21. We’ll discuss what’s happening on the ground, how to protect yourself and your community, and what it will take to achieve real change in 2026 and beyond.
https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/824482/ [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/824482/]
REGISTER HERE [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/824482/]
The event will be in English and Spanish
We hope to see you there.
CADEM
Demócratas,
La agenda antiinmigrante de Donald Trump está generando miedo en nuestras comunidades. Las familias están siendo separadas, los líderes comunitarios están siendo atacados, y ICE está realizando arrestos en juzgados y lugares de trabajo en todo California.
Necesitamos protegernos, proteger nuestras familias y organizarnos para ganar.

_" If something of importance is known in Texas, Matt knows it. With a decline in the number of credible news organizations, the Must Read Texas morning email is indispensable for anyone that wants to continue to be informed." - Former U.S. Senator **Phil Gramm** (R-TX)_
* * *
**AUSTIN NEWSLETTER LAUNCHED**
Are you one of the 100,000+ subscribers to [ATX Pulse](https://substack.com/redirect/14ff4086-6303-4216-8a07-02d340ebcd6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a newsletter that delivers EVERYTHING you NEED TO KNOW about Austin?

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fd723a13-7426-4a9f-9b98-53e918b20647?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_Subscriptions are $5/mo, $50/yr or $199/lifetime here:_ [ATXpulsepremium.com](https://substack.com/redirect/5e52fabd-5f13-4890-b24c-617f4d8055c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
> Read the most recent FREE subscriber email [here](https://substack.com/redirect/054b70b5-fd61-455b-8312-0bf3b1f0f9e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
> Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr [here](https://substack.com/redirect/5e52fabd-5f13-4890-b24c-617f4d8055c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
* * *
* **TOP NEWS**

**" Texas House fails to reach quorum as Democratic walkout hits sixth day," **Austin American-Statesman's **Isaac Yu** \-- "The Texas House failed to reach quorum on Friday, six days after House Democrats fled the state to deny GOP redistricting. House Speaker **Dustin Burrows** had set a 1p.m. deadline for members to return under threat of sanctions.

Only 95 of 150 legislators appeared on the floor and registered as present as the chamber gaveled in, five short of the 100 needed to conduct business. Texas Republicans need a quorum to pass new congressional maps that would send more Republicans to the U.S. House of Representatives.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/662ecbcd-eb5f-4de4-8215-f402cb0cc4b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Burrows said state law enforcement would work through the weekend to return absent Democrats, and he detailed new penalties for them, including requiring them to show up in person to receive pay and cutting off 30 percent of their office's operating budgets. The chamber is now scheduled to return on Monday for another chance of meeting quorum.

"We have all hands on deck," the speaker said. "We are continuing to explore all avenues to compel a quorum, and will keep pressing forward until the job is done."
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBERl $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/662ecbcd-eb5f-4de4-8215-f402cb0cc4b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Addressing the absent members, Burrows said: "Each one of you knows that eventually you will come back and we will pass the priorities of the special session on the call. But with each passing day, the political cost of your absence is rising, and it will be paid in full."

The action caps a week of stalled productivity after more than 51 Democrats sought refuge in Illinois, New York and Massachusetts. Others appeared to have remained in Texas, but as of Friday were not taken into custody under the civil arrest warrants issued by Burrows on Monday.

Republicans have escalated their threats in recent days. U.S. Sen.**John Cornyn** said Thursday the [F.B.I. is working to help locate](https://substack.com/redirect/2b656541-1c10-41a8-9c6f-9ef94a29be3a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) absent members, while Attorney General **Ken Paxton** has filed suit attempting to [force Illinois authorities](https://substack.com/redirect/e2ce3ec1-d661-4af4-8d78-cc039885b71d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to return Democrats, the majority of whom are currently [gathered in Chicago](https://substack.com/redirect/94c4803a-cb01-4707-89f2-6ed77e90b176?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

The Texas Department of Public Safety was said to be searching for members still in Texas. State Rep. **Claudia Ordaz** of El Paso said [on social media](https://substack.com/redirect/d386ce51-da63-4ca4-ad1f-6f84f907e8ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) she has been out of the chamber due to a personal health matter, and that DPS officers had appeared at a family member's residence in search of her. Her statement did not specify whether she is still in the state.

"Harassing my family, spreading lies, and dragging my name into political games is beyond unacceptable," Ordaz said in the post. "It is a deliberate abuse of power and an intimidation tactic."

With their 88-member caucus, House Republicans need 12 Democrats present to resume work. As of Friday, nine Democrats have now registered as present at least once, with **Mary Gonzalez** of El Paso the latest to return. Other members in Texas were **Terry Canales** of Edinburg, **Philip Cortez** of San Antonio, **Oscar Longoria** and **Sergio Mu ñoz** of Mission, **Armando Martinez** of Weslaco, **Eddie Morales** of Eagle Pass, **Joe Moody** of El Paso, and **Richard Raymond** of Laredo.

That places the number of Democrats who have not registered as present even once at 53: a tight margin, since the party needs 51 members absent to break quorum. Of those Democrats, most have been sighted in Illinois or other states at press conferences or public events with blue-state governors.

If enough Democrats are brought back to the House before Monday, Burrows said he would call the members into session.

"DPS is in the field to execute these warrants," Burrows said. "Should they lead to the civil arrest of our absent colleagues over the weekend, your are on call. You will need to be available to return to Austin with a minimum of six hours of notice."" [AAS](https://substack.com/redirect/a24fc94f-2bc9-4694-bf0a-af300005c9da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)
* * *
**FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED** _: As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. Free subscribers will need to become paid subscribers to receive full story summaries._
* * *
* **TOP NEWS**

**" Ken Paxton asks Texas Supreme Court to expel 13 House Democrats over redistricting standoff" **[Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/51fbb9d3-cf46-4264-aab6-a1de767b9059?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

**" 'Yellowstone' creator selects small Texas town for next spinoff series 'Rio Palo'" **[SAEN](https://substack.com/redirect/1fb4e075-5f86-4e80-be67-395f033b25c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)
* * *
* **#TXLEGE**

**" Judge blocks Beto O'Rourke from financially supporting Texas Democrats who left the state" **[Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/9c35740c-353e-45ec-90ba-2b518de07b59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

**" Texas Senate panel advances bill swapping STAAR exam for three shorter tests" **[Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/dbba0a1c-afe0-47be-a24c-e8f4177ad937?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* **LOCAL GOVERNMENT**

**" Chaos erupts at Commissioners Court as Lina Hidalgo's proposed tax hike fails to pass" **[Hou Chron](https://substack.com/redirect/07f2f12f-eee2-46c7-8e04-4f3dfeaf732c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

**" Heider Garcia resigns as Dallas County elections chief" **[Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/bc8cb8d4-4eb8-4eb9-9c0f-b7638a0b686a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *

With a decline in the number of credible news organizations, the Must Read Texas morning email is indispensable for anyone that wants to continue to be informed." - Former U.S. Senator Phil Gramm (R-TX) AUSTIN NEWSLETTER LAUNCHED Are you one of the 100,000+ subscribers to , a newsletter that delivers EVERYTHING you NEED TO KNOW about Austin? | | ---|---|--- Subscriptions are $5/mo, $50/yr or $199/lifetime here: . TOP NEWS " Texas House fails to reach quorum as Democratic walkout hits sixth day," Austin American-Statesman's Isaac Yu \-- "The Texas House failed to reach quorum on Friday, six days after House Democrats fled the state to deny GOP redistricting. House Speaker Dustin Burrows had set a 1p.m. deadline for members to return under threat of sanctions. Only 95 of 150 legislators appeared on the floor and registered as present as the chamber gaveled in, five short of the 100 needed to conduct business. Texas Republicans need a quorum to pass new congressional maps that would send more Republicans to the U.S. House of Representatives. Burrows said state law enforcement would work through the weekend to return absent Democrats, and he detailed new penalties for them, including requiring them to show up in person to receive pay and cutting off 30 percent of their office's operating budgets. The chamber is now scheduled to return on Monday for another chance of meeting quorum. "We have all hands on deck," the speaker said. "We are continuing to explore all avenues to compel a quorum, and will keep pressing forward until the job is done." Addressing the absent members, Burrows said: "Each one of you knows that eventually you will come back and we will pass the priorities of the special session on the call. But with each passing day, the political cost of your absence is rising, and it will be paid in full." The action caps a week of stalled productivity after more than 51 Democrats sought refuge in Illinois, New York and Massachusetts. Others appeared to have remained in Texas, but as of Friday were not taken into custody under the civil arrest warrants issued by Burrows on Monday. Republicans have escalated their threats in recent days. U.S. Sen.John Cornyn said Thursday the absent members, while Attorney General Ken Paxton has filed suit attempting to to return Democrats, the majority of whom are currently The Texas Department of Public Safety was said to be searching for members still in Texas. State Rep. Claudia Ordaz of El Paso said she has been out of the chamber due to a personal health matter, and that DPS officers had appeared at a family member's residence in search of her. Her statement did not specify whether she is still in the state. "Harassing my family, spreading lies, and dragging my name into political games is beyond unacceptable," Ordaz said in the post. "It is a deliberate abuse of power and an intimidation tactic." With their 88-member caucus, House Republicans need 12 Democrats present to resume work. As of Friday, nine Democrats have now registered as present at least once, with Mary Gonzalez of El Paso the latest to return. Other members in Texas were Terry Canales of Edinburg, Philip Cortez of San Antonio, Oscar Longoria and Sergio Mu ñoz of Mission, Armando Martinez of Weslaco, Eddie Morales of Eagle Pass, Joe Moody of El Paso, and Richard Raymond of Laredo. That places the number of Democrats who have not registered as present even once at 53: a tight margin, since the party needs 51 members absent to break quorum. Of those Democrats, most have been sighted in Illinois or other states at press conferences or public events with blue-state governors. If enough Democrats are brought back to the House before Monday, Burrows said he would call the members into session. "DPS is in the field to execute these warrants," Burrows said. "Should they lead to the civil arrest of our absent colleagues over the weekend, your are on call. You will need to be available to return to Austin with a minimum of six hours of notice."" ($) FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. body:

Derek, Since Texas House Democrats left the state to prevent a vote on the GOP’s discriminatory, gerrymandered map, we’ve seen an outpouring of support from Democrats across the country.**Take a look:** [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-tx-split?amount=10&refcode=em_20250809_4233_fr&refcode2=4233_22930333_dfJt4m&akid=4233%2E22930333%2EdfJt4m) Each dot on this map represents someone pitching in to support the DNC’s work to organize and invest in electing Democrats up and down the ballot — in Texas and beyond. The DNC is the organization best positioned to move our resources toward the places that need them most. Right now, a major focus is Texas, as Republicans attempt to redraw the maps to give themselves FIVE new U.S. House seats. **In the last week, thousands of supporters — all over the country — have stepped up and shown their support for Texans whose votes are in jeopardy, by pitching in to help elect Democrats at all levels who will defend our democracy.** Today’s the day we’re asking you to join them. **[You can use this link to split a $10 contribution between the Texas Democratic Party and the DNC:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-tx-split?refcode=em_20250809_4233_fr&amount=10&refcode2=4233_22930333_dfJt4m&akid=4233%2E22930333%2EdfJt4m)**
